Rui Ge's eyes were red. He had been spoiled since childhood, and this only intensified after entering society.

People around him fawned over him because of his background, gradually making him quite famous in society, which further fueled his arrogant and domineering personality.

Seeing his mother beaten so badly, even disfigured, Rui Ge's scalp tingled.

If he could tolerate this, would he still be himself?

He immediately summoned his henchmen and some big-time thugs to come over.

But...

Just as he brought the machete down on Jiang Tian, ​​his wrist was suddenly gripped by Jiang Tian.

“You dare fight back? Hahaha…” Rui’s smile was sinister.

“I never expected Leader Jing to have such a stupid son.”

Jiang Tian’s eyes flashed.

In the instant the blade struck, Jiang Tian reversed his grip on the man’s wrist. With a snap, the man’s wrist was almost instantly bent at a bizarre angle, and the blade tip had already reversed direction.

Thud!!!

The blade, perfectly timed, plunged into Rui’s chest.

Blood splattered, but for Jiang Tian, ​​who had already killed hundreds of drug dealers, facing such scenes always made him want to calm down.

“You, you fucking dare to stab me?” Rui’s mouth was gushing blood.

He touched his mouth, and Rui seemed to realize something. His eyes widened, filled with a strange fear of death.

No, death came so suddenly.

Jing Rui was stunned.

Having been in the underworld for so long, this was the first time he'd ever seen anything like it!

"Am I...going to die?"

Jing Rui looked down at his left chest. He looked up at Jiang Tian again, only to find that Jiang Tian's face remained expressionless.

Jing Rui felt fear.

Regret.

What kind of ruthless person had he provoked?

But no one gave him an answer.

Thump!!!

Jing Rui collapsed to the ground.

And at the scene...

Zhao Wei, frantically running out of the restroom...

The henchmen who knew Jing Rui's background...



Chapter 222 Cutting you up is giving you face, how dare you not appreciate it?


"You killed Young Master Jing?"

"Are you crazy?"

"It's over, the sky has fallen."

Those who came with Jing Rui were all pale-faced as they stared at Jiang Tian.

They'd gone mad.

Young Master Jing was actually dead.

However, Jiang Tian remained relatively calm.

What's the panic about self-defense?

Having been repeatedly schemed against, and with Jing Rui coming to question him, he had no interest in, and didn't want to, think about any hidden plots behind it.

But since Leader Jing liked to use him as a scapegoat, passively enduring it wasn't Jiang Tian's style.

He could say with certainty just now that no matter where he was, Jiang Tian was in the right.

Because he was passively retaliating during Jing Rui and his group's attack, in the split second they drew their knives, he seized an opening in their attack. Forced to deflect their wrist strike, the knife, in its trajectory, accidentally pierced a vital area. And, perfectly timed, after the opponent lost their ability to resist, he refrained from further physical harm.

No matter who came, Jiang Tian was in the right.

He had stated it from the beginning.

Although, during the operation, Jiang Tian didn't want to retaliate in defeat, it was because he didn't want a useless leader leading a group of comrades to their deaths in this struggle.

Making pointless sacrifices.

Even Song Qiuwan and Zhao Qiuni, who came out of the room, were stunned by what they saw.

Mainly, they hadn't expected these people to actually dare to attack Jiang Tian with knives?

It wasn't that Jiang Tian had killed Jing Rui in retaliation.

It was that these people dared to point knives at Jiang Tian?

These people.

Do you know what pointing a knife at Jiang Tian represents?

Political matters can be handled using various methods, but they must always be within certain rules.

But you dared to take a knife to someone.

This isn't just a political issue anymore. The crucial point is, if you were simply attacking a politician, that would be one thing.

But you dared to take a knife to a hero of six merits?

A hero who made outstanding contributions to the fight against drugs, setting a heroic example for the entire nation's anti-drug efforts—you dared to do such a thing?

Leader Jing schemed and plotted, but in the end, he only dared to send his wife.

Even then, he sent his wife to take the beating.

And even then, he tried to justify it by saying Jiang Tian only acted out of impulse and needed to be suspended from duty to reflect on his actions, even suggesting that Jiang Tian should take a break.

You, as his son, dared to point a knife at Jiang Tian?

Do you know the nature of this?

Jing Rui didn't know, and his cronies who followed him knew even less.

These men were all unemployed in their twenties, or at least from wealthy families; otherwise, they wouldn't have been brought along by Jing Rui as trusted henchmen.

Such backgrounds would allow them to rule like kings among ordinary people.

But in front of Jiang Tian...

And they even brandished weapons. What does that mean?

For example, Luo Kang was Jing Rui's right-hand man, but his family was actually quite well-off.

His family practically monopolized the supply of vegetables and other goods in Yunhai city, controlling nearly 80% of the market.

All of this was built by Luo Kang's father, who could earn tens of millions, nearly a hundred million, in net profit annually even while lying at home.

In 2003, this was already considered terrifying wealth for a second-generation rich kid.

Like many others, after acquiring wealth, Luo Kang's father turned his attention to fame, fortune, and power.

Especially building networks of connections.

Planting his son Luo Kang and the son of Boss Jing, they were birds of a feather, their wickedness leading them to join forces.

Especially since recent rumors circulated that Boss Jing was about to be promoted to the third most powerful figure in Yunhai.

That's the third most powerful figure in the provincial capital!

Luo Kang naturally fawned over Jing Rui.

But this man before him had actually killed Jing Rui?

He killed him?

"You've committed a terrible crime, do you know that? Not only have you committed a terrible crime, you're all finished, the sky has fallen!" Luo Kang cried out in terror.

The son of the soon-to-be number three is dead.

This is a devastating blow!

The sky has fallen!

Even they, these underlings, will be implicated.

Who can withstand the wrath of the future number three?

And just then...

The sound of police sirens rang out from downstairs.

This only fueled Luo Kang's panic. He racked his brains trying to understand how this person dared to do such a thing.

A madman! Why isn't this madman locked up in a mental hospital?

"The police are here! You're finished! Not just you, your whole family is finished!" Luo Kang roared at Jiang Tian.

Because, in the coming days, countless people throughout Yunhai, because of Leader Jing's promotion—even if Leader Jing doesn't do anything, countless forces eager to curry favor with him and establish connections—will launch a frenzied attack on Jiang Tian and his entire family.

"What, am I just going to stand here, not fight back, and let you all hack me to death?" Jiang Tian chuckled lightly.

Luo Kang sneered, "If Young Master Jing cuts you, at most you'll be injured and taught a lesson, he won't kill you. But do you know what you'll face if you kill Young Master Jing? Execution. And after you're executed, many people will target your family."

What nonsense about not extending harm to family.

For criminal gangs and some audacious criminal groups, they live by the law, willing to do anything to achieve their goals.

As for Jiang Tian, ​​what kind of self-defense is this?

Ordinary people can justify self-defense.

But don't you know that this society isn't just about laws?

Thump thump thump!!!

Just then.

The elevator doors opened.

Immediately afterwards, a group of armed police rushed in.

Jiang Tian recognized the leader—Captain Zhang from the Criminal Investigation Division.

Although he was in plainclothes, Jiang Tian and Zhang were both from the Municipal Public Security Bureau, so Jiang Tian recognized him immediately.

On the other side was Song Liguo.

The two men stood to the left and right. In front of them, inside the crowded elevator, were members of the Narcotics Control Unit and the Criminal Investigation Unit, but unmistakably, everyone was armed.

The three men in front of them even had a riot shield erected the moment the elevator doors opened.

Seeing this scene, Luo Kang looked at Jiang Tian with resentment.

They're here, they really came.

And so many people have come with such importance. It's over. If Jiang Tian is executed, will Leader Jing hold a grudge against them?

Even Zhang Zhi is here.

Luo Kang kept thinking to himself. He knew Zhang Zhi; they had even eaten together and discussed things about Yunhai.

But the next moment…



Chapter 223 Execution, they must be executed, all of them must be executed.


"Don't move! Everyone stay still! Drop your weapons, squat down, hands behind your head!"

Chief Zhang of the Criminal Investigation Department charged out, pistol raised, shouting, the muzzle gleaming as he pointed at Luo Kang.

*Thud!*

Luo Kang then remembered his weapon and quickly threw it to the ground. His henchmen followed suit.

"Chief Zhang, this man... this madman killed Young Master Jing! Arrest him!" Luo Kang thought Chief Zhang had misunderstood and hurriedly said to him.

*Bang!*

But the next moment, Chief Zhang kicked Luo Kang in the knee from behind, instantly sending him to his knees.

*Click!*

Before Luo Kang could react, Chief Zhang had already handcuffed him.

"Chief Zhang, the murderer is him! Don't misunderstand, you've arrested the wrong person!" Ignoring the pain in his knees, Luo Kang quickly spoke up, "I'm Luo Kang, Chief Zhang. We ate together. The dead man is Young Master Jing. That person killed him. Why are you arresting me?"

*Buzz!*

Upon hearing this, Chief Zhang, the criminal investigator, was indeed met with a chorus of stares. His face turned green.

The murderer who attacked the anti-drug hero with a knife claimed to know him.

Who was it? Who wanted to harm him?

Who had he offended?

*Boom!*

Seemingly afraid Luo Kang would say anything more, Chief Zhang slammed the butt of his gun into Luo Kang's mouth.

*Splat!*

Luo Kang, who was speaking, coughed up blood, his teeth shattering.

The intense pain prevented Luo Kang from even screaming. The next moment, he heard Zhang Zhi's hurried voice: "Officer Jiang, are you alright? Are you injured? A thug tried to attack you! We arrived as soon as we received the news."

To Zhang Zhi, what was this "Leader Jing" anyway?

Even if he did get promoted, what good would it do? What achievements would he have?

And Jiang Tian? Who was behind him? Chief Gao, Gao Xiaolong! "Leader Jing" wasn't in the police system; he couldn't control him.

But Zhang Zhi was in the system.

Everyone knew how much Gao Xiaolong favored Jiang Tian. If Jiang Tian spoke to Gao Xiaolong behind his back, he might be transferred to some unknown place in a few days.

In the system, you have to be careful.

Zhang Zhi wouldn't get involved in Jiang Tian's power struggle with the higher-ups.

But you damn idle socialites, attacking an anti-drug hero, and even attacking an injured anti-drug hero with a weapon!

"I'm fine, but Zhang Zhi, do you know them?" Jiang Tian asked.

Zhang Zhi's smile instantly turned awkward as he quickly explained, "Officer Jiang, you misunderstand. This family is in the vegetable trade. They practically monopolize a large portion of all the major vegetable markets in Yunhai. We've contacted them regarding some security and stability issues, but there's absolutely no private relationship between us."

Waaaaah!!!

Luo Kang, lying on the ground, stared wide-eyed.

Looking at Zhang Zhi standing before Jiang Tian explaining, his face was filled with disbelief, his head spinning.

Wait, who is this person?

Who the hell is this?

Luo Kang felt dizzy.

Before Luo Kang could even process what was happening, Song Liguo, a police officer with the same rank as Zhang Zhi, spoke up: "Execute him! This kind of bandit must be executed. If he's not executed, who will dare to charge forward and fight the enemy to earn merit? Since we've let our heroes shed blood, we absolutely cannot let them shed tears again. We must, in the name of the Municipal Bureau, when submitting the case files to the procuratorate and the court, strongly demand the execution of this heinous criminal whose crimes are extremely egregious."

Buzz!

Luo Kang was dumbfounded.

The four or five people who had come along, lying on the ground with him, were equally dumbfounded.

Then their eyes all turned to Luo Kang.

"Waaah..." Luo Kang tried to speak, whimpering.

His eyes were still filled with terror as he looked at Jiang Tian.

Thump, thump, thump!!!

At this moment, Jiang Tian slowly approached Luo Kang, squatted down, and looked at the group, saying, "Did you hear that? Execution! Don't think this is a joke. Your actions are extremely heinous. If you report each other and confess honestly, I might consider pleading for leniency and giving you a suspended death sentence. But if you don't cooperate, you will definitely be executed."

Attempted murder, shouldn't he be executed?

What a joke.

Don't they even consider what kind of crime they committed?

To fight someone with his expertise, do these people even have the brains? If it wasn't someone Jiang Tian could kill, would he have stabbed him?

"Who are you? Who are you really?"

Luo Kang, his mouth gushing blood, cried out in terror to Jiang Tian.

He thought Jiang Tian was the one to be executed.

But in the end, he realized that the clown was himself, and he was the one executed.

"It's me!"

Jiang Tian pointed to himself, then pulled out his black leather badge. The badge and the word "Police ID" on it made Luo Kang dizzy, almost causing him to collapse.

Jiang Tian continued, "This arm of mine was injured while performing a great service for the country and its people. Do you understand?"

Jiang Tian's gaze, looking down at him, grew cold.

Although he wouldn't directly reveal his specific rank, Jiang Tian's name was practically a secret to someone at a certain level.

It revealed something.

He might be able to extract something from these people.

Sure enough.

Upon hearing Jiang Tian's words,

if he hadn't been handcuffed, Luo Kang would have almost slapped himself a few times.

A great hero?

An attack on a great hero injured while serving the country?

Luo Kang's eyes rolled back; he almost fainted from fright.

"How should we interrogate these people?"

Song Liguo walked over to Jiang Tian and asked, but his main concern was how to handle Jing Rui's body.

Jiang Tian wouldn't frame someone; if he were to do it, he would do it openly and honestly.

Wasn't Leader Jing using him as a breakthrough point to attack Jiang Peng? Then why couldn't Jiang Tian use Jing Rui to attack Leader Jing?

He could make him lose his son and his hopes and opportunities for promotion.

"Uncle Song, my suggestion is to take Jing Rui's body directly to the Municipal Public Security Bureau for an autopsy, and arrest all these people as well, then conduct a fair and open interrogation," Jiang Tian said with a cold laugh.

He really wanted to know.

When Leader Jing learned of everything, the sight of him watching helplessly as his son died, and even applauding, was truly remarkable.

"Good lad, you've improved a lot!" Song Liguo glanced at Jiang Tian with surprise, his eyes filled with delight.

He saw ample political acumen in Jiang Tian.

Considering Jing Rui's attack on Leader Jing,

regardless of whether he was killed in retaliation or not.

Jing Rui led men to attack Jiang Tian with weapons—that was an undeniable fact.

While Song Liguo had initially intended for Jiang Tian to recuperate in the hospital, leaving the rest to him, Jiang Tian insisted on returning to the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

Mainly, he wasn't comfortable leaving him there.

After all, Li Qishan was still at the Municipal Bureau.

Through Song Liguo, Jiang Tian had gained a thorough understanding of Li Qishan. Li Qishan, previously the head of a branch bureau, had been transferred to the Municipal Bureau as deputy head—a move seen as a power struggle at the top.

Why do I say this?



Chapter 224 Exploded, Jing Feifan's world collapsed, the unfilial son....


“Before, the Yunhai Municipal Public Security Bureau was a place that all leaders feared. Nobody wanted to be in charge of this work because whoever was in charge would end up with a political stain on their record. It was like a poison gas; everyone was terrified.”

“Then, you know, your dad took over, but that was before. You know the situation then; there was almost no progress in drug enforcement and combating crime. The whole country was calling Yunhai a ‘Little Gotham.’ You know how many times the bureau chief was exposed and criticized online.”

Jiang Tian nodded.

Uncle Song continued, “But now, since you opened up the situation, do you know what the Yunhai Municipal Public Security Bureau is? Achievements.”

“Brilliant achievements.”

At this point, Song Liguo couldn't help but marvel at the terrifying transformation.

Now, new leads emerge every day, and several drug dealers are arrested daily.

With the situation completely under control, the subsequent work became much simpler.

Because there was a goal and a direction.

“As for Li Qishan, his background is rather complicated. He's gotten involved through Leader Jing's connections, but this deputy director has many people watching him. Leader Jing doesn't have that kind of power yet. It's likely that Leader Jing has someone backing him, but it's hard to say exactly who,” Song Liguo explained the current situation.

Jiang Tian sneered, “It's not just that. Li Qishan is leading a joint operation with the people next door. If it succeeds, Li Qishan will probably be publicized everywhere and become a representative figure.”

This isn't just stealing the credit; it's stripping Jiang Tian of all the honors that rightfully belong to him.

But unfortunately, Jiang Tian's identity can't be publicized so openly.

This is where some people will start plotting.

In the following time, Jiang Tian inquired about the situation again and finally learned that he would be leading his men to leave the country that night.

To be honest, Jiang Tian wasn't optimistic about this operation because of the complex environment next door.

Anyone could be a criminal.

Just as Jiang Tian returned to the police station, having learned more about the city bureau's situation from Song Liguo, and then returned to the city bureau itself.

At the city bureau.

A government car with a very prominent license plate pulled up in front of the city bureau.

A moment later.

The secretary in the passenger seat hurriedly opened the car door, then went to the back seat and opened the door.

A moment later.

Zhou Zhao stepped out of the government car.

Before Zhou Zhao got out, someone had already gotten out of another government car following behind his.

Jing Feifan jogged up to Zhou Zhao: "Secretary Zhou."

Zhou Zhao nodded slightly.

Jing Feifan followed Zhou Zhao closely, saying, "Secretary Zhou, when I first joined the organization, I also worked in the public security and procuratorate system. I'm very familiar with all the work of the public security, procuratorate, and courts. Deputy Director Li was my former subordinate; his abilities are definitely sufficient."

Zhou Zhao, walking ahead, nodded slightly upon hearing this. Although he didn't explicitly state his opinion, Zhou Zhao's attitude was enough to surprise and delight Jing Feifan.

Before the two of them, Jiang Peng was followed by Li Qishan, and behind them were some important leaders from the Municipal Bureau.

However, at this moment, all of them were watching with subtle expressions.

Jiang Peng, in particular, had his pupils shrink when he saw Zhou Zhao and Jing Feifan walk together.

He never would have imagined it.

How did Jing Feifan manage to curry favor with Zhou Zhao, and why was Zhou Zhao inexplicably so close to Jing Feifan?

But this also meant one thing.

It seemed like the two were inspecting together.

But there was more to it than met the eye—the final third-ranking official.

It was already decided.

"I understand."

Jiang Peng was shocked, instantly understanding.

The position of head of the political and legal system had definitely been decided for Jing Feifan.

Only in this way would Zhou Zhao bring Jing Feifan along, partly for inspection, and partly to inform everyone of this information.

This news was like a bolt from the blue for Jiang Peng.

Thinking of this,

Jiang Peng seemed to age a little, a bitter smile appearing on his lips.

When he had no opportunity before, he had never thought of, nor had he ever fought for, worked tirelessly without complaint.

But Jiang Tian had already worked so hard. As his father, with Jiang Tian's continuous achievements and the Municipal Bureau's rising status, he naturally had the resources and was unwilling to be outdone, wanting to try his luck.

"Secretary Zhou," Jiang Peng greeted.

Zhou Zhao looked at Jiang Peng and nodded slightly: "The Municipal Bureau's work has been outstanding recently, especially the upcoming joint operation with the neighboring organization. This is very important; it's the first cooperative operation, and it will serve as a deterrent to all the criminal groups next door. I wouldn't feel at ease if I didn't come and see for myself. Director Jiang, don't overthink it."

As he spoke,

Zhou Zhao patted Jiang Peng's shoulder, specifically emphasizing this point.

But Jiang Peng knew perfectly well that these words should be interpreted in reverse.

"Secretary Zhou, rest assured, I have made thorough preparations. There will absolutely be no accidents. Leader Jing, please rest assured as well. Once abroad, promoting national prestige is my duty," Li Qishan assured, patting his chest.

Good, good, good.

Jing Feifan smiled broadly, even glancing at the dejected Jiang Peng out of the corner of his eye. A sneer played on his lips; he was far from being a match for him.

He should just behave himself.

He actually dared to compete with him? Jing Feifan could only think that Jiang Peng had become arrogant because of his powerful son, but little did he know that Jing Feifan had been fighting his way up in the system for years.

In the end, he would even make sure Jiang Peng lost his position as bureau chief.

However, this wasn't Jing Feifan's goal. He only needed the municipal bureau to follow his instructions.

"I only need to use a few tricks, and that will be your limit. A simple trick will be enough to bring you down," Jing Feifan thought with a faint smile.

As for being seen by many high-ranking police officers, Jing Feifan wasn't afraid.

By the time they returned, his position as the top official in the political and legal system would be sealed. It would be too late to say anything then.

Could they really dismiss him for this? Don't be ridiculous.

Blame Jiang Tian for being so brainless; his chances of winning, which were originally only 60%, instantly became 100%.

Jing Feifan followed Zhou Zhao, and the group walked from under the red flag on the training ground towards the building.

But just then...

Woo-hoo-hoo!!!

A chaotic, extremely loud, and rapid series of sirens rang out, growing louder as they drew closer.

Soon...

When the noise reached a certain level,

Zhou Zhao, who was walking in front, stopped.

Then, he turned his head, looking puzzled, towards the entrance of the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

As Zhou Zhao turned, everyone's eyes turned to the entrance.

"What's going on?" Zhou Zhao asked.

"Was there an operation today? I didn't know anything about it," Li Qishan asked Jiang Peng, looking confused.

Jiang Peng also frowned slightly.

Because of the operation at headquarters and negotiations with the neighboring department, the two of them had just gone to the provincial department for a meeting with headquarters.

They had only just returned and weren't entirely clear on the situation.

"Jiang Peng, what kind of director are you? So many police cars, such a big operation, and you didn't know?"

At this moment, Jing Feifan frowned, instinctively questioning Jiang Peng as if he were the third-in-command.

But before he could finish speaking, a voice rang out behind him: "I don't know what Director Jiang did, but I'd like to ask Leader Jing, did you authorize your son to lead a group of men with weapons to the hospital to openly attempt to kill a police hero?"

Jing Feifan: "???"

Has the sky fallen???



Chapter 225 If I don't run away, I'm afraid I'll be hacked to death in the hospital.


*Buzz!*

Jing Feifan was completely bewildered.

What was this person saying?

What was he saying?

Why was he saying such nonsensical things?

Let's rewind a few minutes.

Almost all the personnel from the Criminal Investigation Division and the Narcotics Control Division stationed at the Municipal Public Security Bureau were mobilized, filling more than ten police cars to capacity.

The numerous leaders and civilian staff of the Municipal Public Security Bureau, standing under the fluttering red flag, watched in disbelief as the vehicles stopped in the parking lot of the compound not far from the flag.

As a large number of police officers rushed out, it would be hard to believe there wasn't a major operation going on.

And as the director of the Municipal Public Security Bureau, Jiang Peng, how could you not know? What kind of director are you?

"Deputy Director Li is new to the Municipal Bureau and is unfamiliar with many situations and personnel. That's understandable. But you, as the director, have been rooted in the Municipal Bureau for many years. With such a large-scale reshuffling of your subordinates, how could you not know? In this country, the Party's leadership is paramount. As a leader, you haven't fulfilled your duties, haven't ensured your subordinates are under the Party's command. Director Jiang, do you think you've done a satisfactory job?"

Jing Feifan launched into a tirade against Jiang Peng.

In front of everyone, including Zhou Zhao, he relentlessly criticized Jiang Peng.

Jiang Peng's face darkened.

"Deputy Director Li and I just went to a meeting at the Provincial Department and aren't very familiar with the situation here," Jiang Peng said, his expression extremely grim.

"At least you should have been informed before the personnel reshuffling," Jing Feifan pressed further.

“Alright, the Municipal Bureau has been very busy lately, so many cases, so many breakthroughs, arresting drug dealers every day. An occasional emergency operation by our subordinates is normal. Let's leave it at that for now and not talk about this anymore.” Zhou Zhao frowned, stopping Jing Feifan from pressing further.

Jing Feifan was startled. He realized he had gone too far and had displeased his superiors. Having worked in the system for so many years, Jing Feifan quickly tried to salvage the situation, saying, “Of course, Director Jiang is extremely busy, and headquarters has urgent operational missions, which is understandable. But from the public's perspective, everyone wants a responsible director so that the people can feel at ease and have a greater sense of security.”

Zhou Zhao nodded slightly, glancing at Jing Feifan.

Finally, he looked at Jiang Peng.

His opinion on which of these two to choose, who to support, was extremely important to the organization, holding a weighty position.

Initially, Zhou Zhao leaned towards Jiang Peng, given Jiang Tian's consecutive merits and the Municipal Bureau's sudden and significant achievements.

The entire Yunhai had even received verbal praise from higher-ups.

However, Jiang Tian went too far in some ways, provoking public outrage.

He gave the impression that he was so powerful that he could even openly assault the leader's wife, a situation that created a sense of impending doom.

"If you dare to do this now, what will you do when you accumulate more merit? Will you even dare to assault the leader?"

Under this mindset, it was natural that the general consensus leaned towards promoting Jing Feifan, as Jing Feifan was already the first choice.

And in fact, even as they were speaking,

Song Liguo had already led his men over.

Halfway there, they overheard Jing Feifan's initial question, which immediately made Song Liguo's brow furrow. He and Jiang Peng were old comrades-in-arms.

Given their close relationship, Song Liguo was already extremely enraged by Jing Feifan's blunt attack on Jiang Peng.

Just as Jing Feifan finished speaking, secretly wiping away sweat and regretting his rash words,

behind him, Song Liguo, unable to bear it any longer, coldly uttered the words he had just heard:

His son?

Weapon?

Assault?

Heroic policeman?

Fine, fine.

He recognized each word individually, but why did they sound so unfamiliar when put together?

Why couldn't he understand?

"Song Liguo, what nonsense are you spouting? How dare you speak to Leader Jing like that? Apologize immediately!"

At this moment, Li Qishan stepped forward and loudly reprimanded Song Liguo.

"Deputy Director Li, what's wrong? Can't you speak?" At this moment, Jiang Tian slowly stepped out from behind Song Liguo, speaking expressionlessly.

When Li Qishan saw Jiang Tian, ​​his face instantly turned ashen.

After all, he was the deputy director!

A mere squad leader dared to tell him to get lost in front of so many people—where did that leave his dignity?

Luckily, this wasn't at the municipal bureau. If it were, how could he lead the work? Who would listen to him?

Therefore, seeing Jiang Tian made Li Qishan feel uneasy. He was new here, and Jiang Tian, ​​with his numerous merits and achievements, truly showed no respect; he really had no way to deal with him.

Was it a joke to expel a hero with six merits—an unprecedented achievement highly valued by the Ministry of Public Security?

Seeing Zhou Zhao and Jing Feifan both turn to look at Jiang Tian, ​​Li Qishan quickly said, "Comrade Jiang, if you're injured, you should stay in the hospital. Don't run around. The leaders are here; you must be mindful of your image. You're young and need time to mature. There are some things you shouldn't say carelessly."

Zhou Zhao nodded in agreement and smiled, "Jiang, if you're injured, just focus on treatment. Running around will only worsen your injury. What will we tell Chief Gao when he comes?"

Facing Jiang Tian, ​​Zhou Zhao said nothing more.

Just seeing Jiang Tian, ​​Zhou Zhao greeted him with a friendly smile.

His tone was as amicable as could be.

A joke.

The legend of Yunhai.

Jiang Tian had made such a great contribution; correspondingly, it was also a brilliant achievement in Zhou Zhao's political career. After all, Jiang Tian rose to power in Yunhai.

Of course, most importantly, Jiang Tian was officially registered in the Ministry of Public Security. Moreover, there were even rumors that Jiang Tian had caught the eye of a certain bigwig, who intended to summon him.

Zhou Zhao greeted Jiang Tian with a broad smile and extremely courteous attitude.

Jiang Tian glanced at Jing Feifan, a half-smile on his face, then turned to Li Qishan, finally looking at Zhou Zhao and saying, "Secretary Zhou, I dare not stay in the hospital!"

"What are you saying? You dare not stay in the hospital? Are the doctors going to eat you? What are you afraid of?" Zhou Zhao joked in a very friendly tone.

This made Jing Feifan, who was watching from the side, feel a chill in his heart, seemingly realizing how much Zhou Zhao valued Jiang Tian.

This was not good news for him.

Just then, Li Qishan also looked at him. They exchanged a glance, their expressions neither pleasant.

So, Jing Feifan laughed, "Everyone says Officer Jiang, you're the reincarnation of Yama, able to kill hundreds of vicious drug dealers and make them run for their lives. A small hospital like this scares you?"

Jiang Tian chuckled, "The hospital didn't scare me. The problem is someone tried to attack me with a knife in the hospital. Tell me, how could I stay here? If I stayed any longer, you probably wouldn't see me anymore, because I'd probably be hacked to death in the hospital in a few days."

"Hacked to death..."

"Yeah, hacked to death?"

"Someone attacked you?"



Chapter 226 Don't worry, your son is on the stretcher.


Zhou Zhao initially greeted Jiang Tian with a gentle smile, but after a moment's hesitation upon hearing his words, he abruptly turned to look at Jiang Tian.

Meanwhile, at the scene...

The initial slight murmurs vanished instantly after this sound.

Everyone's heads were spinning.

Someone had attacked Jiang Tian with a knife?

After a moment of silence, Zhou Zhao, a seasoned veteran, coldly and firmly declared, "Who did it? Investigate thoroughly, find out the truth. Whoever is involved, arrest them all."

Following Zhou Zhao's words, the scene erupted in chaos.

It must be said...

Even Li Qishan, who harbored deep hostility towards Jiang Tian, ​​felt a chill run down his spine upon hearing this.

Good heavens.

The sheer scale of this man's achievements—if he wore those medals on his chest, they would probably terrify a whole host of people.

They were hostile, but could only target him within the rules of the system.

They absolutely dared not do anything outside the rules.

Jing Feifan was also utterly astonished.

After Zhou Zhao's statement, Jing Feifan quickly followed up: "That's right, such murderers should all be executed without exception. Comrade Jiang, rest assured, the Party and the motherland are your unwavering support."

"Good, good, good."

Jiang Tian's smile gradually brightened as he looked at Jing Feifan and said, "Leader Jing thinks so too."

"That's right, they must be severely punished, otherwise, how can we convince the public?" Jing Feifan nodded firmly.

"In that case, I'm relieved." Jiang Tian nodded slightly.

"No wonder so many people were mobilized, Jiang, have the murderers been caught?" Jiang Peng quickly asked Jiang Tian.

Actually, at this moment, Jiang Peng somewhat regretted sending Jiang Tian in.

Constantly facing danger.

Sometimes, Jiang Peng even doubted whether his initial actions were right or wrong.

Despite achieving great success, as a father, he had to personally send his son to the dangerous front lines time and time again. For any father, that feeling was one of constant worry and danger, each time risking the loss of his son.

Now, although he has achieved great success,

it seems many people are eyeing him, and he constantly faces the threat of criminal retaliation.

Things are fine now, but even the best-laid plans can go awry.

There's no way you can guard against a thief for a thousand days.

One accident could cost you your life.

"The murderer has been caught," Jiang Tian said slowly, narrowing his eyes.

"Good, well done! Here, I want to make a statement today: this must be highlighted in the case file; I recommend execution," Zhou Zhao said excitedly.

Jing Feifan nodded repeatedly at Jiang Tian, ​​saying, "Jiang, we're all very happy that we caught the murderer. But even if you're in danger and in a bad mood, you can't say things carelessly. So, Jiang, please don't mistake some people for others."

As he spoke, Jing Feifan smiled slightly at Jiang Tian, ​​even stepping forward to pat him on the shoulder, seemingly valuing him highly. He continued, "Comrade Jiang, do a good job. I will definitely mentor you in the future. By the way, have you found out who the murderer is?"

"The murderer has been found, Leader Jing," Jiang Tian replied with a smile.

"Good, you found out. Who was it?" Jing Feifan seemed angry for Jiang Tian.

"Your son!" Jiang Tian replied matter-of-factly.

"My son?"

Jing Feifan smiled broadly: "You were just joking. I know you're hostile towards me becoming the Secretary of the Political and Legal Affairs Commission, and your father not taking the position. You were just making jokes. But Jiang, some jokes can't be made carelessly, or you'll cause trouble. Look, your father is already sweating."

Just kidding.

His son killed Jiang Tian?

Do you think he believes that?

Do you think Secretary Zhou Zhao believes that?

That's right, even Secretary Zhou doesn't believe it. He automatically filtered out that sentence, thinking Jiang Tian was just deliberately trying to provoke them.

As for Jiang Peng, he was sweating profusely, wiping his brow. "Little Jiang, don't talk nonsense."

"That's right, I've met Jing Feifan's son before. He's honest and simple. Why would he try to attack you? Little Jiang, you can't joke like that. Pretend you didn't hear it the first time, but if you keep talking, you're just being immature," Zhou Zhao said to Jiang Tian.

He didn't believe it.

He simply didn't believe it.

Because Zhou Zhao understood.

If Jing Feifan's son, armed with a knife, led a group of people to the hospital and openly attacked Jiang Tian, ​​the anti-drug hero, recipient of the Special Merit Award, and a Second-Class Heroic Model,

that would be a catastrophe.

Do you know what that means?

Don't think there's no connection between father and son.

It's as if Jing Feifan used Jiang Tian to scheme against Jiang Peng, and Jiang Tian only hit Madam Jing once.

Madam Jing only suffered minor injuries, but it directly changed the entire Standing Committee's opinion; everyone thought Jiang Tian had become arrogant.

Those leaders were all in a state of mutual dependence; if he dared to attack Madam Jing today, he might attack them tomorrow. Therefore, they felt they couldn't let Jiang Tian get too arrogant; they had to curb his momentum.

Jiang Tian was already so powerful. If Jiang Peng were to take another step forward—no, even ascend to the top in one fell swoop, directly stepping into the forefront of power, like a poor person suddenly becoming rich—wouldn't that fuel Jiang Tian's arrogance? No, they had to suppress him.

A small incident could generate such a huge impact.

It directly caused Jiang Peng and the Secretary of the Political and Legal Affairs Commission to miss each other.

And if Jiang Tian were to be murdered by Jing Feifan's son with men at knifepoint...

Good heavens.

But at this moment, the police officers behind him were already escorting the detained Luo Kang and others down.

Very tense.

Extremely tense.

The first one was Luo Kang.

Jing Feifan's heart skipped a beat.

He knew all too well how close Luo Kang and his son were.

Is it over?

Jing Feifan's heart pounded wildly.

The second one.

Very good, another of his son's underlings.

Jing Feifan had met him before.

This made him even more panicked.

He prayed incessantly.

Jing Rui, please don't show up. That rebellious son, please don't show up.

Thankfully, Jing Rui didn't appear when the five arrested criminals were being escorted past.

At this moment, Jing Feifan felt somewhat exhausted. Good.

As long as Jing Rui wasn't personally involved, there was a lot of room for maneuver. Jing Feifan was confident he could handle it.

As long as he wasn't present.

After the initial panic, Jing Feifan said to Jiang Tian, ​​"My son isn't here at all. This is baseless slander, Xiao Jiang. Do you think that just because you've made a small contribution, you can so brazenly slander others?"

After a pause, Jing Feifan continued without giving Jiang Tian a chance to speak, "Although your father and I were competing for the position of Secretary of the Political and Legal Affairs Commission, and your father was slightly less capable, the Party and the organization were willing to believe in me and gave me this opportunity, you can't use that as a reason to slander someone without any basis!"

Zhou Zhao remained silent.

He keenly sensed something was amiss.

Jing Feifan's actions just now were strange, leaving Zhou Zhao completely unsure of his stance and only able to watch silently.

Jiang Peng also looked at Jiang Tian, ​​his forehead beaded with sweat.

His palms were almost dripping with sweat.

The atmosphere was heavy.

Everyone expected Jiang Tian to panic and offer an explanation, but the next moment, Jiang Tian's smile remained unchanged as he said, "Leader Jing, don't worry, there's more to come."

There's more to come?

Why aren't they together?

Jing Feifan's gaze was somewhat unfocused.

But only for a fleeting moment.

The next moment...



Chapter 227 The sky has collapsed, and the sea of ​​clouds is about to change.


Inside a large, separate police van, two forensic doctors from the city police department, both wearing white coats, opened the back door and pulled out a stretcher.

The person's face was covered.

Actually, there's a common practice and custom in this regard: if someone can be revived, or has even a tiny bit of life left, with just a slight chance of survival, their body will absolutely not be covered.

When the face is covered,

especially when the person is being dragged by forensic doctors at the city police station, there's only one reason: an autopsy and examination of the deceased.

Everyone present was familiar with this.

In other words, this scene indicated one thing:

The person on the stretcher was a corpse.

"Good morning, sir."

The two forensic doctors, carrying the body, walked up to the group and greeted them.

"Wait a moment." Jiang Tian stopped them.

Then he went to the stretcher, reached out, and yanked off the white sheet covering it.

A moment later.

A lifeless, ashen-faced corpse silently appeared before them.

Accompanying this was Jiang Tian's calm voice: "Not long ago, while I was recuperating in the hospital, this man, accompanied by five or six thugs, broke into my ward, wielding machetes. Fortunately, I was taking a walk downstairs at the time, and when I returned, I was unfortunately cornered in the elevator."

He paused slightly, then continued, "Upon seeing me, they immediately surrounded me without any explanation, wielding machetes and intent on killing me. Forced into a corner, I could only defend myself. The instant this man drew his knife, I had no time to react; I could only instinctively grab his wrist, trying to push him away. But to my utter surprise, the blade pierced his heart."

"Even more regrettable is that afterwards, after the police leaders arrived and investigated him, it turned out that the leader was none other than Director Jing's son. Of course, I don't suspect Director Jing of plotting anything nefarious, but I am still quite saddened by Young Master Jing's death."

Jiang Tian briefly recounted the main events of the incident.

*Whoosh!*

The sky collapsed.

The sky collapsed and the earth caved in!

The weather in Yunhai is about to change!

Everyone stared in horror.

The most crucial thing was what Jiang Tian said.

"Good, good, perfect."

Yes, it was a flawless reason.

He was attacked head-on by a thug.

Caught off guard, he didn't have time to react and tried to push the attacker away, but during the attack, the attacker stabbed him in a vital spot with a large knife.

No matter who came, even the best lawyer in the country personally defending him, in this case, Jiang Tian would be acquitted on the spot, meeting all the elements of legitimate self-defense.

But for Jing Feifan...

The high-spirited Jing Feifan, about to succeed as the Secretary of the Political and Legal Affairs Commission, the third-in-command, hoped to wake up from this nightmare as soon as possible.

Because this almost meant that his world had collapsed.

His son was gone.

His career, it seemed, was also on the verge of collapse.

Is the weather about to change in Yunhai?

"Jingrui is dead?"

Jing Feifan stood before the corpse, unable to look, yet forced to.

His entire body trembled.

He gritted his teeth.

This nightmare was too terrifying for him.

This sudden change had caught everyone completely off guard.

Everyone had initially thought Jiang Tian hadn't caught them red-handed, that he was still too inexperienced.

But who could have predicted this?

The corpse was right there.

"You did this on purpose?" Jing Feifan suddenly stared at Jiang Tian, ​​his eyes bloodshot.

Unfortunately, facing Jing Feifan's intimidating presence and murderous gaze, Jiang Tian's expression remained unchanged: "Leader Jing, I merely fought back and killed the assailant who tried to kill me. Did you, Leader Jing, when someone was chasing you with a knife, even consider intentionally killing them?"

Jing Feifan's eyes were bloodshot. "Others may not have that ability, but you could easily handle hundreds of drug dealers. Why can't you give an ordinary person, a young man whose mind isn't fully mature, a chance?"

"He's young, Leader Jing, you're mistaken. Your son is twenty-three this year, I'm only twenty-one. Who's the young man?" Jiang Tian retorted.

Huh?

Leader Jing stared intently at Jiang Tian's face, finally realizing that the man before him was the pioneer of the Special Merit Award.

A recipient of five First-Class Merits.

A heroic police officer hailed as a Second-Class Hero.

This year, he hadn't even graduated yet.

And now he's a police inspector.

Dead silence.

Zhou Zhao, at this moment, was completely numb.

Secretary Zhou looked around, then at the corpse on the stretcher. Even with his intelligence, he was at a loss for words.

But he knew one thing.

Once it was confirmed that Jing Rui dared to openly lead men to murder Jiang Tian with knives, Jing Feifan's path to promotion would likely remain only a fantasy.

"Comrade Jiang Tian, ​​the matter hasn't been fully investigated, the issues haven't been clarified, and there might be some hidden circumstances. We can't be so hasty in drawing conclusions. What if young Jing Rui was coerced, or perhaps he had other compelling reasons? All of these are possible. Before the investigation is complete, as law enforcement officers, we cannot speak recklessly," Li Qishan hurriedly interjected, trying to smooth things over.

These words

instantly made Jiang Tian laugh.

Investigate?

How much more investigation is needed?

But before Jiang Tian could speak...

A loud, furious voice rang out from behind Jiang Tian: "What kind of investigation is this? He was practically wielding a knife to the head, and you still don't understand? Getting killed in self-defense is your own fault. I thought the new Deputy Director Yunhai was someone important, but it turns out he's just a bunch of idiots."

*Buzz!*

The moment those words were spoken,

the scene fell even quieter.

Especially the ordinary police officers, who unconsciously retreated several steps, afraid of getting splattered with blood.

It was a battle of titans; it was terrifying.

Because...

The person who spoke, the person speaking from behind Jiang Tian...

was Gao Yangyang.

She was dashing and smartly dressed in a neat police uniform, followed by nearly twenty officers.

All of them were from the 21st Bureau of Headquarters.

Others might have to consider the deputy director's face, but in front of Gao Yangyang, Deputy Director Yunhai was nothing!

To flaunt one's authority in front of Gao Yangyang is simply idiotic.

Li Qishan, his face flushed with rage, retorted, "Who are you? Where did you come from? Do you have the right to speak here?"

After all, Li Qishan was new and genuinely didn't know Gao Yangyang's identity.

But Gao Yangyang produced her identification, walked up to Jiang Tian, ​​and said expressionlessly, "Gao Yangyang, a Level 3 Police Inspector from the 21st Bureau, directly under headquarters. If I hadn't come here today, I wouldn't have known that this is how Yunhai treats our anti-drug heroes. If this matter isn't resolved reasonably, I will report it to Director Xu in its entirety. After all, Officer Jiang is also considered a member of our Narcotics Control Bureau, and also a high-ranking official at headquarters."

Buzz!!!

Zhou Zhao, who was observing the situation, instantly turned green.

Thinking about Jiang Tian's background and the high regard he was held by, if the higher-ups found out about this...

Buzz!!!

The sky has fallen.

The world has changed!

This looks like the weather in Yunhai is about to change!



Chapter 228 The Game Behind the Scenes: Am I Just a Pawn?


Zhou Zhao knew perfectly well Gao Yangyang's background and status; she was the daughter of Chief Gao.

Especially after hearing Gao Yangyang's words, Zhou Zhao's face turned green.

Gao Xiaolong was a man who wouldn't tolerate the slightest injustice.

Back when Jiang Tian was first reborn, Gao Xiaolong had shown him no mercy and relentlessly insulted him.

Later, after discovering that Jiang Tian wasn't as useless as he seemed, his opinion of Jiang Tian completely changed.

But without a doubt, Gao Xiaolong's personality was one of absolute hatred for evil.

If Gao Xiaolong found out that Jiang Tian had been chased and attacked with a knife in the hospital...

Hiss!!!

A rustling sound rang out, and Gao Yangyang, with her entourage, stopped beside Jiang Tian. She glanced down at Jing Rui's corpse, then her gaze instantly sharpened, scanning the people before her.

Finally, her gaze fixed on Li Qishan, pointing at his nose without mercy, she said, "How could someone as blind as you become the deputy director of Yunhai? Is Yunhai out of people? How can someone as blind as you be a deputy director? Dozens of police officers, two branch captains witnessed it themselves, there's even surveillance footage at the scene—the evidence is conclusive! And you still suspect an anti-drug hero of lying? You haven't even investigated this properly? What do you mean? Are you perhaps pulling strings behind the scenes?"

Boom!!!

Gao Yangyang's words caused an instant uproar.

Li Qishan's eyes widened, almost spitting blood, as he pointed at Gao Yangyang, shouting, "You're slandering me!"

This accusation terrified Li Qishan.

Then she quickly turned to Zhou Zhao and said, "Secretary Zhou, don't listen to her nonsense, this has nothing to do with me."

"Deputy Director Li, whether there's any connection or not can't be confirmed until the investigation is complete. You are highly suspicious right now. I suggest that Deputy Director Li be immediately suspended from his duties pending investigation. We'll talk again after the investigation is clear." Gao Yangyang pressed on aggressively, giving Li Qishan no chance to speak.

Boom!!!

Everyone exploded in shock.

Good heavens.

Jiang Tian, ​​standing to the side, clearly felt Gao Yangyang's terrifying output.

In front of him, Gao Yangyang always gave Jiang Tian the feeling that, "This girl is so nice, her voice is so sweet," and he loved listening to her speak.

But now.

Not only Zhou Zhao and Li Qishan, but even Jiang Tian was stunned into silence.

You're really like this, Gao Yangyang.

Didn't you always speak so sweetly?

After relentlessly pressuring Li Qishan, Gao Yangyang caught Jiang Tian glancing at her out of the corner of her eye. She turned her head and gave Jiang Tian a meaningful look.

Jiang Tian gave a stiff smile and said to Gao Yangyang, "Yangyang, you can't pressure a leader like this just because your grandfather is Chief Gao. Secretary Zhou is a good secretary. When he heard I hit Madam Jing, the entire Standing Committee was buzzing about it that day. I even heard someone approved my father's promotion on the spot. I'm not as valuable as a high-ranking leader's wife. I was chased by her son with a knife, but she still got promoted. Sigh, what use is this merit to me? All those medals and achievements will be yours later."

Zhou Zhao's smile grew increasingly stiff and awkward.

Jing Feifan's scalp tingled, and he abruptly looked at Jiang Tian, ​​his mind going blank.

The sky had fallen.

Jing Feifan initially thought Gao Yangyang was targeting Li Qishan, but he was wrong. The two of them, working together, were actually after him.

A decisive blow.

Jiang Tian's words were an instant, decisive blow.

Jing Feifan's eyes widened. This was Jiang Tian, ​​lacking political acumen and all brawn and no brains?

Who told him Jiang Tian was only good at fighting drug dealers and was simple-minded?

Who was it?

Jing Feifan looked at Zhou Zhao.

Sure enough, Zhou Zhao had already looked around; everyone's eyes were fixed on him.

He knew that if he couldn't handle this today, he wouldn't be able to gain public support.

And it would chill everyone's hearts.

The most terrifying thing wasn't that, but that if Jiang Tian really caused trouble, he could go all the way to the Party, all the way to Beijing.

The Six Merits King, the originator of the Special Merit Citation.

He could be sitting right at the gates of Beijing.

The thought sent chills down Zhou Zhao's spine.

So, thinking of this, Zhou Zhao glanced at Jing Feifan, a hint of regret in his eyes.

If anyone's to blame, it's you for not educating and protecting your child properly.

Therefore, Zhou Zhao quickly said, "Feifan is quite good, his abilities are considerable. The organization decided to give him an important position because of his abilities. But Feifan, you can't even discipline your own son. He led a group of people to publicly kill a great hero with a machete. How can the organization continue to believe in your abilities, believe that you can bring peace and happiness to the millions of people in Yunhai?"

Jing Feifan's face turned deathly pale.

He had schemed for so long.

His position was gone?

"Secretary Zhou, no, let me explain," Jing Feifan said慌张地.

"Explain what? Explain how your son killed the hero, or explain that Comrade Jiang acted in self-defense? Do you expect your son to pay with his life? Feifan, you've disappointed me greatly."

After saying this, Zhou Zhao's gaze returned to Jiang Tian, ​​his expression suddenly softening. "Comrade Jiang, rest assured, trust the Party and the organization. They will never allow any injustice to occur. As for some rumors circulating outside, Comrade Jiang, don't believe them entirely."

After saying this,

Zhou Zhao left the Municipal Bureau with an extremely grim expression.

Inspection?

What kind of inspection is this?

What a load of rubbish.

With something like this happening, the entire Yunhai district will be reshuffled.

What? You think this is a small matter? Do you understand the concept of "one small thing affecting the whole situation"?

It seems like Jing Feifan is simply out of the running for the top position in the political and legal system.

But in reality, Jing Feifan's rise to power is the result of multiple parties pushing and compromising.

Behind this lies a great deal of issues and power struggles.

If Jing Feifan doesn't get promoted, the consequences will be terrifying.

This will only worsen Jiang Tian's mood.

Because of the power struggle behind the scenes, Jiang Tian has become an insignificant pawn.

How can he be in a good mood?

But...

Zhou Zhao understands even more clearly that if Jing Feifan gets promoted,

the consequences are something Zhou Zhao doesn't want to bear.

As Zhou Zhao leaves, Jing Feifan's face turns pale.

His son is dead, and his chance for promotion is gone?

For him, all the misery of his life has happened on this one day.

When Jing Feifan glances at Jiang Tian, ​​he finds that Jiang Tian isn't even looking at him. That indifference makes Jing Feifan grit his teeth.

His words were still echoing in his ears.

He couldn't care less about the pain in his face.

"Secretary Zhou, wait for me!" Jing Feifan understood the gravity of the situation and ran after Zhou Zhao.

The inspection ended abruptly.

As the deputy director, Li Qishan stood there.

Cold sweat beaded on his forehead.

His political acumen was exceptionally high; the situation before him was terrifying.

Two low-ranking third-level police inspectors had actually forced Zhou Zhao to resign?

Was the world too terrifying, or was he having a nightmare?

The most terrifying thing was...

The consequences of this incident.

If Jing Feifan hadn't gone up...

He wouldn't have been the only one to suffer.



Chapter 229 Yunhai Holds a Meeting, the Boomerang Hits Himself


"Comrade Gao, thank you this time." Jiang Tian thanked Gao Yangyang.

To be honest, if Gao Yangyang hadn't come, Jiang Tian wouldn't have dared to directly turn hostile.

But Gao Yangyang's appearance gave Jiang Tian a slight boost.

Originally, Jing Feifan might have had a chance if he pulled some strings, but now, Jiang Tian knew it was completely over.

Jing Feifan was utterly out of the question.

Not being punished was already an act of exceptional leniency; wanting a promotion? Dream on!

But all of this was due to the pressure from Gao Yangyang and the situation in Kyoto.

Most importantly.

Jing Feifan had no chance.

Then Jiang Peng's chance had arrived.

If Jiang Peng were promoted to third-in-command.

It would be a dramatic change of fate.

In his previous life, Jiang Peng was placed under investigation, but in this life, he became third-in-command.

"Just a verbal thank you?" Gao Yangyang stood tall and slender, especially in her formal attire, looking extremely dashing.

"I'll treat you to dinner," Jiang Tian thought to himself, feeling deeply grateful. He hadn't deserved such treatment.

Gao Yangyang hadn't needed to step in, but for his sake, she had dared to directly confront Jing Feifan, and even threatened Zhou Zhao.

How could Jiang Tian possibly repay such kindness?

"It's a deal," Gao Yangyang said, her face lighting up with a smile. "Officer Jiang."

Of course, besides that, Jiang Tian was also quite surprised by Gao Yangyang's rank.

Gao Yangyang was a few years older than him, but even so, at that age, she was already a Level 3 Inspector.

Don't assume that being at the same rank as Jiang Tian meant that Level 3 Inspector was low.

This rank, at this age, aside from Jiang Tian, ​​was practically the ceiling.

"Before going undercover, I was already a Level 1 Superintendent. After going undercover, thanks to you, I managed to gain some merit and was promoted ahead of schedule," Gao Yangyang explained.

The two continued talking.

Jiang Tian didn't rush to leave the Municipal Public Security Bureau. As for Li Qishan, he left the bureau as soon as Jing Feifan left.

However, neither Jiang Tian nor Gao Yangyang took it to heart.

They both understood that an earthquake was about to occur in Yunhai.

At least, an earthquake in the officialdom would be absolutely terrifying.

"Promise me you won't be an undercover agent again," Jiang Tian sighed.

Gao Yangyang suddenly looked at Jiang Tian, ​​her eyes shining, and said, "Are you worried about me?"

That adoring look in her eyes.

That surprised look in her eyes.

Jiang Tian quickly turned his head away, feeling completely numb.

The biggest downside of being with Gao Yangyang was that it was too easy to get carried away.

Every move, every word.

It was enough to make him explode with arrogance.

"Actually, I don't often go undercover. Last time it was just because my appearance was too similar to the drug dealer I was meeting. I don't usually go undercover, and I definitely won't again," Gao Yangyang explained.

Jiang Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

It had only been a day since he last came to the Municipal Public Security Bureau, and upon his return, he found the entire bureau incredibly busy.

Almost every one of the small, dark rooms was packed with people.

The shouts and reprimands of interrogators rang out constantly.

"Captain Jiang, are your injuries healed?"

"You were too awesome just now. I've been annoyed with that new deputy director for a while now."

"Yeah, coming here, I always feel like he's giving orders haphazardly."

"We're already busy with work, and since he came, instead of going anywhere else, he's been meddling in our anti-drug squad's affairs. Captain Jiang, when are you coming back?!"

After the visiting leaders left,

Jiang Tian entered the anti-drug squad's office on the second floor. Everyone greeted him with smiles.

Their attitude was practically overflowing.

Jiang Tian could only respond with smiles.

After dealing with everyone, Gao Yangyang also left, as she hadn't reported to the provincial department yet.

This operation involved a joint command center established by the provincial department and headquarters.

Gao Yangyang had to go there to handle some matters.

As soon as Gao Yangyang left, Jiang Tian was immediately pulled into Jiang Peng's office.

"You kid, you were crazy just now, talking to Secretary Zhou like that. Won't that get you into trouble?" Jiang Peng asked Jiang Tian with a worried expression.

He himself didn't care; the key was that he was afraid it would affect Jiang Tian's future.

“I’ve already been suspended, what does it matter if I’m not?” Jiang Tian said, shrugging.

“You’ve been suspended?” Song Liguo, who was following behind, suddenly stood up, shocked.

As the branch captain, he hadn’t even known about this.

“The document was issued directly from the Narcotics Control Office. Didn’t Li Qishan tell you?” Jiang Tian asked, puzzled.

Song Liguo shook his head, looking at Jiang Peng in confusion.

Jiang Peng sighed, “A leader told me that Jiang Tian needs some time to recover. Now that he’s injured, it’s best to let him rest and then have his mental health issues properly treated by a doctor. So, Jiang Tian’s duties have been temporarily suspended.”

“That shouldn’t be a suspension!” Song Liguo stood up, his brow twitching.

“Alright, Uncle Song, I’m going to take a rest,” Jiang Tian said.

"Anyway, I'm already suspended, what am I afraid of? So what if he holds a grudge? As long as you get promoted, that's fine. It would be best if you stayed suspended. You'll keep getting promoted, and I'll just be a comfortable second-generation rich kid with no danger. I think it's a good thing." Jiang Tian wasn't really angry.

Since his rebirth, Jiang Tian felt incredibly tired.

Perfect timing. He wanted to deal with his personal issues.

Also, he needed to think about how to handle his relationship with Mu Ya.

"Hey, you're dreaming," Jiang Peng rolled his eyes.

"If there's nothing else, I'll be going now."

Jiang Tian left the Municipal Bureau with a flourish, just as he had come and gone without a trace.

From Jiang Tian's perspective, in another way, his superior wanting him to rest was a sign of consideration for his subordinates; he was grateful beyond words.

He could even brazenly push his father to the top, hoping his father would become a dragon among men.

Reaching the entrance of the Municipal Public Security Bureau, Jiang Tian turned around, glanced at the tall building, and then at the fluttering red flag.

Finally, he turned and left.

Meanwhile, just as Jiang Tian was leaving the Municipal Public Security Bureau with a flourish, preparing to return to the hospital,

Zhou Zhao also returned to the Municipal Government Building.

He immediately instructed his secretary to notify all Standing Committee members to attend a meeting in his office.

After everyone had arrived,

Jing Feifan, who had been searching for Zhou Zhao and wanting to speak with him, but Zhou Zhao had refused to see him, was finally allowed into the meeting room.

"There's still a chance. There's still a chance."

Jing Feifan was overjoyed to see Zhou Zhao.

However, upon entering the meeting room, he found it already full of standing committee members.

Yunhai's standing committee, including Jing Feifan and Jiang Peng, numbered eleven.

However, because Jiang Peng was affiliated with the Municipal Bureau and Zhou Zhao had connections with him, he hadn't been notified.

So, only ten standing committee members were present.

At first, no one knew what was happening.

But the next moment...

Zhou Zhao began, "According to statistics, Yunhai's crackdown on crime, not only in drug trafficking but also in organized crime and related offenses, has made groundbreaking progress. Especially in drug trafficking, statistics show that in a short period, approximately 13,000 kilograms of drugs have been seized."

"Comrades, what a terrifying number!"

"This means that every moment in Yunhai, countless drug traffickers are active and committing crimes!"

"Comrades, you all need to be mindful. And the biggest contributor to this situation should be someone you all know, right?"



Chapter 230 Hoping for Father's Success: In This Life, Different Paths Begin


Zhou Zhao's opening remarks didn't surprise anyone; some even nodded with smiles as they mentioned Jiang Tian's name.

Regardless of their thoughts or opinions about Jiang Tian, ​​one thing was undeniable: Jiang Tian had indeed broken the deadlock in Yunhai.

Before this, the Yunhai Bureau Chief was practically a piece of stinky tofu—everyone was disgusted and wanted to run away.

Now, everyone was scrambling to lead the Yunhai Municipal Bureau.

"Although Comrade Jiang Tian has some lingering mental health issues, his contributions are undeniable."

"Yes, comrade Jiang Tian's suspension is for his own good."

"We all know this, Secretary. Please, just say what you need to say."

The Standing Committee members nodded one after another.

Seeing everyone speaking...

Zhou Zhao grinned, then his face darkened. "And this very hero was attacked, attacked by the son of a leader, forcing the victim to call the police and run to the city bureau. While I was on an inspection tour, he personally came to me begging for help! Comrades, what a terrible situation this is!"

A collective gasp swept through the room.

Every single member of the Standing Committee jumped to their feet instantly, as fast as they could.

Their hearts pounded.

Their eyes widened.

In an instant, they mentally reviewed every possible scenario involving their own rebellious sons.

Zhou Zhao didn't mince words. He went straight to the point: "Jing Feifan, back then at the Standing Committee meeting, you slammed your fist on the table and interrogated Comrade Jiang Peng, saying you couldn't even control your own son. What qualifications did you have to be promoted to manage the safety of millions of people? But now, your son, with several men armed with knives, dared to attack even a heroic policeman. What would he do to ordinary citizens?"

Zhou Zhao roared in fury.

Was the situation complicated?

In reality, there were no true enemies or true friends among the Standing Committee members. There was only a steadfast belief in the struggle,

and mutual compromise.

Jing Feifan wasn't on Zhou Zhao's side, but it was an undeniable fact that Zhou Zhao and those behind Jing Feifan made the same decision.

At that time, Zhou Zhao hadn't given it much thought.

He hadn't considered whether Jiang Tian's feelings were taken into account.

Because the two sides weren't on the same level, Zhou Zhao's considerations didn't take Jiang Tian's thoughts into account.

Back then, you said someone's son hit your wife, but it was just a fight, and everyone, out of respect for you, Zhou Zhao, after weighing the pros and cons, chose Jing Feifan.

But now, your son has killed a heroic policeman.

So, the moment Zhou Zhao finished speaking,

the Standing Committee members were stunned.

All eyes turned to Jing Feifan.

"But my son is dead, dead without explanation," Jing Feifan said, standing up.

Wow!!!

Jing Feifan's son is dead?

Everyone stared wide-eyed, shocked by the sheer volume of events that had unfolded in such a short time.

"Everyone can personally attest to his self-defense. Is it any kind of ambiguity? Jing Feifan, the father is to blame for his son's misbehavior. That's what you said back then. Therefore, I personally believe that Jing Feifan's promotion should be suspended, and I will personally submit a report to the provincial authorities."

Zhou Zhao slammed his hand on the table and spoke directly.

After Zhou Zhao finished speaking, everyone's expressions changed drastically.

The world had changed.

Yunhai was about to undergo a complete transformation.

Now, only Jing Feifan and Jiang Peng were truly competitive. Now that Jing Feifan had lost all hope, who could possibly compete with Jiang Peng?

Jiang Peng had undeniable achievements, raising the security of Yunhai countless times over.

And Jiang Peng's rise would also mean…

"Comrade Jing Feifan, I hope you can consider the bigger picture. Everyone knows your son is gone, and you're heartbroken, but I hope you can try to think more positively."

"Yes, Comrade Jiang Peng is still a good comrade."

"Comrade Jing Feifan, you're being foolish. Since Comrade Jing Feifan is unsuitable, I suggest that Comrade Jiang Peng take over the position in the political and legal system. After all, his background in the public security, procuratorate, and court systems gives him a natural advantage."

"Agreed."

No one here was a fool; the tide turned in an instant.

"However, regarding Comrade Jiang's situation, reinstatement shouldn't be rushed. After all, there are still issues. Safety and mental health testing and treatment are necessary; otherwise, there are too many dangerous and unsafe factors."

One after another, the people below spoke, essentially sentencing Jing Feifan to death.

Promotion?

In his next life.

After all, he had already made his promise.

If something happened to his son, and he changed his tune, going back on his word, Jing Feifan would be finished in this business. Nobody would trust someone so fickle.

This was like shooting himself in the foot.

At this moment, Jing Feifan even wanted to slap himself. If only he hadn't been so ruthless when he pressured Jiang Peng, there would have been room for reconciliation.

"What you say makes sense. Comrade Jiang is young, after all. Headquarters is willing to recruit talent regardless of background, but as local officials, we are responsible for the area and hold crucial positions on the first line of defense. We must nip danger in the bud. If we don't give him time to develop, I'm genuinely afraid a promising talent will be ruined." Zhou Zhao seemed to sigh before speaking slowly.

After the meeting ended.

Hadn't it been said?

In this system, there are no secrets.

Less than two hours after the meeting, most people in the office building already knew the content of the meeting.

And when this news spread completely.

Without a doubt.

It exploded.

Before, too many people had bet on Jing Feifan, thinking he was a sure thing.

But now, it's a complete upset?

Jiang Peng became the ultimate winner.

Jiang Peng's chances were already high, and now that he had passed the local recommendation, there were almost no surprises.

However, the impact of this news after it exploded was also enormous.

Don't be fooled; Jiang Peng was originally a Standing Committee member.

However, he was ranked low and not valued. Aside from a vote, he had virtually no other voice or influence.

Previously, he was also among the lowest-ranking members.

But now it's different.

He's third in the entire Yunhai district.

Besides Zhou Zhao and the mayor and deputy secretary of Yunhai, Jiang Peng instantly became the third-in-command.

What does that mean?

It's equivalent to taking down the entire public security, procuratorate, and judicial system.

Everything was within his purview.

He could intervene in every aspect of Yunhai, big and small.

Otherwise, would Jing Feifan have been willing to compete at all costs?

This time, he truly understood the difference between heaven and hell.

While the Municipal Bureau was holding a tense meeting, Jiang Tian returned to the hospital.

On the way,

Jiang Tian casually bought a very beautiful diamond necklace, spending over 280,000 yuan.

But this didn't bother Jiang Tian.

Because he already had a lot of money in his bank account.

Not only had a small sum of money been deposited into his office building rent account, but also, most of the drug dealers Jiang Tian had arrested recently had hundreds of thousands, even absurdly millions, in bounties. He hadn't checked at first, but Jiang Tian glanced at it when he had a spare moment.

Wow.

His bank account had nearly ten million yuan in savings.

Two or three hundred thousand yuan was nothing to Jiang Tian.



Chapter 231 Wrath: You dare to cross my red line?


By the time Jiang Tian arrived at the hospital, it was already evening.

Jiang Tian's wealth had now reached an incredibly high level, though under normal circumstances, he didn't need it at all.

For example, the bounties on drug dealers alone amounted to millions, and he hadn't even had time to process the office building the system had previously rewarded him with.

"How about buying a car?"

Jiang Tian's mind raced; taking taxis everywhere was too inconvenient.

However, Jiang Tian was already quite high-profile, and buying an overly flashy car wouldn't be appropriate for him within the system.

Naturally, a car that was understated yet luxurious, but suited to Jiang Tian's lifestyle, came to mind.

A Phaeton.

This car is nice.

Over a million, but its appearance is definitely that of a larger Passat.

After returning to the hospital, Jiang Tian went straight to the ward, but Lin Jinxuan was the only one there, which surprised him.

When Jiang Tian returned to the police station, Zhao Qiuni had to return to Kyoto on business.

As for Zhao Wei, he was assigned to monitor a drug dealer.

In short, such missions were rare before, but Jiang Tian's arrival had subtly changed Yunhai.

Previously, the Yunhai Narcotics Control Unit was practically a figurehead.

They couldn't catch anything, and even if they wanted to, they lacked direction.

The criminal networks were incredibly complex, leaving them with no choice but to lie low and wait for the criminal groups to produce a few small-time drug dealers each year to appease them.

But none of them...

The total amount of drug trafficking they carried wasn't enough for the death penalty; they were just below the death penalty, basically receiving a suspended death sentence or life imprisonment.

It could be said that the drug dealers' behavior was an insult to the police.

It was a provocation.

But now it's different.

A breakthrough had been found, and a large-scale one at that. Previously, investigating even a single serious criminal involved immense difficulty, long stakeouts, and countless risks.

However, after the comprehensive arrest of so many drug dealers and the brutal interrogation, some could withstand the pressure, but most couldn't.

This was because these individuals were almost all using drugs as a substitute for selling them.

As addicts themselves, even a little interrogation was enough for them to confess.

As for whether those who confessed were genuine, whether they could be obtained through interrogation, or what to do without evidence—it was a joke. After going through the entire process, you'd be lucky to remain silent.

“Where’s Wan’er?” Jiang Tian walked in carrying some things.

“Look at you and your Wan’er, all lovey-dovey. I’ve taken care of you for nothing.” Lin Jinxuan rolled her eyes in annoyance.

“These are for you.”

Jiang Tian naturally knew that Lin Jinxuan had taken good care of him, although he wasn't to the point of being unable to take care of himself.

However, Jiang Tian felt compelled to express his gratitude for Lin Jinxuan's meticulous care.

"What?" Lin Jinxuan asked curiously, taking the bracelet.

"A gold bracelet. Do you like it?" Jiang Tian replied.

Lin Jinxuan quickly shook her head. "No, I can't accept it."

Upon opening the bracelet and seeing its size, Lin Jinxuan shook her head frantically. This gold bracelet must cost at least tens of thousands.

"It's nothing, it's all bounty money for catching drug dealers. It's too much, I can't possibly spend it all," Jiang Tian said casually, waving his hand.

He hadn't taken over the office building yet.

If he did, the annual rent would be astronomical.

Money had lost all meaning for him.

But Lin Jinxuan was shocked. She felt the weight of his hand more acutely, because this was money Jiang Tian had earned through his own blood, sacrifice, and danger fighting drug dealers: "I can't accept it. This is the bounty you earned risking your life fighting drug dealers, and you're using it to buy me something so expensive..."

In this era, a gold bracelet worth tens of thousands was an astronomical figure.

Because the average monthly income of both the teaching assistant and Jiang Tian, ​​a narcotics officer, was less than one or two thousand.

Even with various benefits and bonuses for good performance, the average narcotics officer's salary was at most twenty thousand a year.

"Take it if you want," Jiang Tian refused directly, then added, "Wait a minute, I'll call Sister Wan'er and ask where she went."

As for Lin Jinxuan, she was originally going to leave, but worried about Jiang Tian, ​​she stayed to check on things when he returned.

"She was called away by the captain who came before her," Lin Jinxuan said.

"What did you say?" Jiang Tian's expression changed instantly.

Sure enough.

The next moment, when Jiang Tian called Song Qiuwan, the phone was switched off.

"Du Qing..." Jiang Tian suddenly stood up, his voice icy cold.

"Jiang Tian, ​​what's wrong?" Lin Jinxuan asked softly.

Jiang Tian didn't answer, because he understood that time was precious.

Normally, knowing they've been discovered by the enemy, one would never risk their life.

But Du Qing just said that for the sake of the mission, he'd rather sacrifice himself because it would save more people, and he didn't care even if the drug dealers had already discovered them.

That's utterly insane.

If he weren't mentally unstable, he could have easily accomplished something by planning carefully while still alive, yet he chose to risk his life.

What else could this be but utter insanity?

They might as well just die themselves.

It might even drag down the team members and Sister Wan'er.

What to do?

Jiang Tian's face was icy cold.

Every detail flashed through Jiang Tian's mind.

From the beginning of the case to all the information they knew about its causes and consequences.

It was certain that the enemy knew their identities 100%.

They had chosen to risk their lives to find information about the drug dealers, and Jiang Tian had clearly told them that.

Jiang Tian believed he had been very realistic; Du Qing would never lead people on a pointless suicide mission.

Then, all the conversations and details with Du Qing flooded into Jiang Tian's mind.

"Contact information..."

At this moment, Jiang Tian's photographic memory proved invaluable.

When Jiang Tian left, Du Qing had given him her business card, saying that if he changed his mind or changed his opinion, he could contact her anytime. Unfortunately, Jiang Tian only glanced at it and left.

Found it.

With his photographic memory, every frame of Jiang Tian's experience could be frozen in his mind, recalled and retrieved when needed.

Based on his recollections, Jiang Tian slowly dialed Du Qing's phone number. As for why he couldn't simply investigate through the anti-drug system...

What a joke.

The police simply don't have the authority to investigate these people; their identities and all information are kept strictly confidential.

Even if you investigated now, you might immediately be targeted by the national security department.
