Fortunately, the only good news for Jiang Tian was that the call went through.

The phone rang for a moment.

Finally, it was answered.



Chapter 232 Who is the prey, and who is the hunter?


Du Qing's voice came through the phone: "What, Comrade Jiang Tian, ​​have you come to your senses?"

In the hospital room, Jiang Tian's face was terribly grim. "Du Qing, you're testing my limits."

As Jiang Tian's voice rang out...

Du Qing's voice remained unchanged: "Comrade Jiang Tian, ​​I'm sorry to say, but if you're threatening me, then I can only say you're ridiculous."

Jiang Tian's eyes flashed with a fierce light.

Du Qing's voice continued, "Comrade Jiang Tian, ​​I hope you understand one thing: your skills are impressive, and you've made many contributions. But you must understand that the drug dealers you face and the criminals we face are two different concepts. You're only dealing with localized crimes, while we're targeting crimes that endanger national security. Are you going to disregard national security for your own selfish desires?"

"To be honest, I'm very disappointed in you. You don't choose to save people yourself, and you even try to stop people you know for your own selfish desires."

"I thought you were a hero for all your achievements, but now it seems you're nothing more than a good-for-nothing, selfish and incompetent fool."

As she spoke, Du Qing's voice grew increasingly cold, filled with contempt and disdain.

On a commercial airliner.

Du Qing, seatbelt fastened, held her phone, her eyes filled with regret.

This was no joke.

She had initially held Jiang Tian in extremely high regard.

He was even considered a potential recruit, a recipient of multiple First-Class Merits, and a pioneer of the Special-Class Merit Award, making history.

Now, it seems...

Such a narrow-minded and selfish person is nothing more than this.

"Wan'er, do you understand now? The man you've been so devoted to is actually like this." Du Qing looked at Song Qiuwan beside him.

"Captain, there must be a misunderstanding here." Song Qiuwan shook her head repeatedly.

"Alright, then I'll give him another chance."

After saying that, Du Qing put the phone back to her ear and said, "Comrade Jiang Tian, ​​our operation this time is due to a new, extremely important lead. Under our covert investigation, the enemy has formally arranged a meeting with a very important person, and this person is a key figure in this drug trafficking group. Therefore, we must act this time. I hope your selfishness won't affect Wan'er. I've told you so much only out of consideration for your status, your contributions, and Wan'er's sake. Now, do you understand how selfish you are?"

"If you have even a shred of dignity, you should be ashamed and admit your mistake right now."

Admit your mistake?

On the other end of the phone, Jiang Tian was stunned, almost laughing in anger.

It's like you need bait to hook a fish; without bait, how can the fish take the bait?

You plotted against their drug trafficking network.

Why can't the drug trafficking group plot against you?

The most important point in drug control is to never underestimate any drug dealer, and the same applies to criminals.

Jiang Tian didn't understand why the other party would make such a mistake.

Especially after these words, Jiang Tian's eyes narrowed: "I hope you can stay rational. How could you not know that was a smokescreen from the criminals, designed to lure you into a trap?"

"Heh, may I ask, what could we possibly have to make criminals plot?" Du Qing countered.

This question stunned Jiang Tian.

Yes.

Based on the information Jiang Tian had received, there was absolutely no evidence to support this claim.

But Tucha was a blatant example.

What benefit would Tucha gain from ambushing anti-drug police? No rational person would do such a thing, yet Tucha did it anyway.

And what about those people?

"Can't say anything now, huh? If you're afraid of death, don't try to influence us. I'm glad you didn't join us; otherwise, I can hardly imagine how out of place you would be in our team, and it would be an insult to us."

After saying this,

Du Qing immediately hung up the phone, her tone filled with disappointment, as if she were truly utterly disillusioned with Jiang Tian.

"Now do you see clearly?" Du Qing said to Song Qiuwan.

Song Qiuwan hurriedly shook her head: "He must have misunderstood. He's not that kind of person."

"Even now, are you still speaking up for him?"

Du Qing's face was full of disappointment.

She also seemed utterly disappointed in Song Qiuwan.

She turned to look at the other two team members, Chu Jing and Lü Chun.

Lu Chun was injured, but Jiang Tian had held back; otherwise, he could have killed Lu Chun with a single kick. The force of the kick would have caused Lu Chun excruciating pain, but it would have allowed him to heal quickly and return to combat.

"Qiu Wan, what does that man have besides his good skills that makes you so hung up on him?"

"Yes, Qiu Wan. This mission is an S-rank mission. These kinds of missions are inherently extremely dangerous. But from another perspective, what are we doing in this organization? If it weren't dangerous, we would have been dealt with by the regular departments long ago. What use are we then?"

Chu Jing and Lu Chun were exchanging words when Du Qing waved her hand and said, "Alright, that's enough. Perhaps as a narcotics officer, he has lost his ambition. He might not have been like this before. After accumulating enough merit, he's afraid of losing it, which is why he's so cowardly. What are we afraid of? We're not afraid of anything."

After a pause, Du Qing continued, "Our informant's information is absolutely accurate. Once we secure the evidence, we can notify and coordinate with the local police for a joint arrest and interrogation. At that point, we'll save millions of families. That person's biopharmaceuticals ostensibly research drugs, but in reality, they're researching new types of drugs every year, smuggling a terrifying amount of heroin into our country through special channels, spreading throughout the nation. This matter is practically a done deal; even if something unexpected happens, we can escape unscathed."

"I..." Song Qiuwan froze, stunned by their words.

She thought of many things.

But seeing the captain's unwavering conviction, Song Qiuwan wavered somewhat.

Yes!

If it can save more people, sacrificing oneself would be worthwhile.

Besides, it doesn't necessarily have to be a sacrifice.

Soon.

The plane reached the other side of the Atlantic.

With a glide, the plane came to a stop on the airport runway, the roar gradually subsiding.

All the passengers on the commercial flight disembarked in an orderly manner.

After Du Qing and his men disembarked, they immediately contacted their informant, who also arrived at the airport to meet them.

The informant was a foreigner in his forties. He was a local homeless man recruited by Du Qing, who brainwashed and controlled him through various means.

Now, Du Qing had even helped him become the owner of a small company, with a certain cooperative relationship with the target pharmaceutical company.

His background had been investigated; he became homeless due to bankruptcy caused by a divorce.



Chapter 233 Total Annihilation, Du Qing is Devastated


"Captain Du, I'm absolutely certain. When I went to gather information today, the other party received a phone call and hurriedly left the scene. Then, based on my communication with the bribed clerk at the pharmaceutical company, I discovered that the target leaves for a few days every month around this time, and then a few days later, the company receives a significant amount of investment." The informant reported honestly.

Du Qing: "How many people were involved?"

"A secret meeting between two people."

"Is the information reliable?" Du Qing inquired.

Although she mocked Jiang Tian's words, she decided to remain cautious.

Fortunately, the informant's answer was also honest: "I can guarantee the information is absolutely reliable."

"Good!!!"

"Action!!!"

Upon hearing this, Du Qing waved her hand, then gave Song Qiuwan a look, and Song Qiuwan instantly understood, dialing a secret number.

A moment later.

Song Qiuwan hung up the phone and nodded to Du Qing, saying, "Captain Du, the target is indeed there."

Du Qing nodded slightly in agreement. As the external party, their operations were naturally incredibly meticulous.

How could they possibly trust a single informant?

Besides, there was another informant watching from the shadows.

Having received concrete information, Du Qing had no more reservations.

"Remember the mission objective. Focus entirely on the enemy's drug trafficking routes and channels. Everything else is secondary," Du Qing concluded.

Soon.

As the vehicle drove on.

The Ford drove further and further into remote areas, which was perfectly normal in this country across the Atlantic.

The land was vast and sparsely populated.

The vehicle drove alone on the road.

Everyone inside the car wore expressions of excitement and seriousness.

Once this incident was investigated thoroughly.

Their team would at least receive a collective first-class merit award, along with various promotions and rewards.

For them, maintaining composure was a highlight of their resumes.

Even if it couldn't be exposed.

"Their secret meeting place is the famous Salife Estate, a wealthy neighborhood in the town of Sade. Everyone there is incredibly rich and powerful. Besides the wealthy, many celebrities also own mansions there. Be careful during the operation; don't cause too much trouble, or the police will be there in three minutes," the informant said, turning to look at the group as he drove.

After all, this is a wealthy area; the police officers live off donations from these rich people.

The distorted system has created a distorted social environment.

"We know what we're doing. Two people won't make a sound," Du Qing said confidently.

The car quickly pulled up and stopped a few dozen meters from a mansion.

The other side of the Atlantic is already sparsely populated, and the wealthy area is even more desolate, but the infrastructure and decorations are world-class.

Especially since it was still pitch black at night.

Across the Atlantic, there was a time difference with China.

The luxurious villa district was brightly lit.

Du Qing didn't hesitate at all, opened the car door, got out with the others, and then nodded slightly to them.

Chu Jing arrived at the villa's entrance, first surveying the surroundings before quickly inserting a disc and unlocking the electronic lock without making a sound.

Inside the villa, only a dim light shone.

Du Qing shook his head after looking at it: "Even with numerous merits, one can't rest on their laurels, becoming so cowardly that they dare not do anything even slightly dangerous. Our investigation this time was absolutely thorough. I can't understand how a top-tier hero could become so cowardly. Jiang Tian is so disappointing."

"However, we must be careful."

The wealthy residents here are the bosses of the police officers on this side of the strait. Crossing the border to arrest their breadwinners, it's already merciful that they haven't fired on them.

After they quietly entered, they looked around again to ensure there was no danger before reaching the villa's entrance. The same electronic lock was unlocked by Chu Jing again.

Click!

Du Qing released the safety on the gun, gently placed his hand on the grip, and quietly pressed it.

The door lock made a faint click.

This made Du Qing's heart skip a beat, but after a few seconds, there was still no sound from inside the villa.

Du Qing's heart finally relaxed, and then, with lightning speed and agility, he pushed the door open.

With a click, Du Qing rushed in first, bending low.

Following closely behind.

Were Song Qiuwan and the other two.

The four of them cautiously entered the villa.

The lighting inside was dim.

The four of them couldn't see clearly what was in front of them.

Of course, that didn't matter.

What mattered was.

The next moment.

Du Qing felt a cold touch on his forehead.

Following that.

Click!

Before Du Qing could react, the lights in the house were turned on.

From the dim light, suddenly exposed to blinding sunlight, the four people in the room felt a momentary daze before their eyes adjusted.

*Whoosh!*

What they saw.

Du Qing stared at the dark muzzle of a gun.

Her gaze gradually shifted, and using her peripheral vision, she finally made out her surroundings.

Two rows of people stood on either side of the villa's door.

Standing in perfect formation, all dressed in black, their faces expressionless, they held pistols, dozens of muzzles pointed at them.

Directly in front of them, another man in black held a pistol to her forehead.

And on the sofa some distance away.

The crisp, clanging sound of metal clashing rang out continuously.

A man had a voluptuous woman in his arms, a cigar dangling from his mouth, occasionally puffing out, a metal lighter in his hand; the sound was coming from the lighter.

But at this moment, the man's gaze was fixed on them as if they were already dead.

The alluring woman would occasionally pick a grape from the table and offer it to the man.

Silence.

Deathly silence.

The entire environment seemed to have lost all sound.

Gulp!

Du Qing also lost all sound.

But her body subconsciously swallowed.

Their faces had lost their usual composure and coldness, leaving only paleness and blankness.

The next moment, the man on the sofa spoke, almost making them faint.

"To be honest, I have to thank you. If it weren't for you, I really wouldn't have been able to find the traitorous mole infiltrating the company—it turned out to be this bastard."

Buzz!!!

Du Qing exploded.



Chapter 234 First Meeting: Giving the Department Boss a Small Shock


An undercover agent.

That's right.

Was it for the sake of an undercover agent?

In that instant, Du Qing understood, and understood even more clearly what the other party was plotting.

In fact, people like Du Qing, even if they don't admit it, always possess an innate sense of superiority as a police officer, and this superiority is actually a fatal flaw.

Because it causes significant problems and flaws in their deductions and decisions. For example, Du Qing verified the information from two undercover agents, even those who were completely independent.

Only after their information corroborated each other's leads and finally matched up did they cautiously decide to begin their operation.

Also, it was because they were too confident in the loyalty of their undercover agents.

These are the main reasons for this problem, but the root cause is Du Qing's excessive arrogance.

Her arrogance led to this incident.

Du Qing's face turned deathly pale.

A thunderbolt struck her mind. She recalled her earlier words to Jiang Tian, ​​spoken with an extremely arrogant and condescending tone: "You should be ashamed of your words, for they are cowardice."

In her view, she was 80% certain. Even with only a 30% chance, she should have acted in the face of such a reward.

She deeply regretted her past actions; her 80% certainty had made her too confident.

Bang!

Just as Du Qing was thinking this,

a middle-aged Western-looking man, dressed in a suit but now utterly disheveled,

was kicked from behind and fell face-first into the face of the man smoking a cigar. Even now, the man smoking the cigar was still looking at the disheveled undercover agent with a mocking expression.

"Richard, I've suspected many people, but I've never suspected you, because you're the subordinate I personally rescued and recruited. Why did you betray me?" the man smoking the cigar, sitting on the sofa, coldly questioned the disheveled undercover agent on the ground.

Richard looked up, gritting his teeth, and said, "I want to devour you alive! You saved me? Did you really save me? Do you think I don't know? It was your men who killed my family."

"Oh, so you knew!"

The cigar-smoking man's expression remained unchanged. He ignored Richard, the undercover agent, and turned his gaze back to Du Qing. "I suspected there was a mole within the group after the last intelligence leak, but I couldn't find him. I even know everything about your investigation. You don't think I don't know about the mole outside, do you? But with his status, he couldn't possibly have obtained the leaked information last time. I knew then that the mole inside was no ordinary person. This time, I deliberately revealed myself to find you. I didn't expect you to actually take the bait."

Du Qing's face grew even paler.

Because the events had gradually become exactly as Jiang Tian described.

Absolutely identical.

And he was still relentlessly mocking Jiang Tian.

If he weren't being restrained, Du Qing would have truly wanted to slap himself right now.

"The boss is right, your actions were seen through long ago."

Thump, thump, thump!!!

Just then, familiar figures gradually emerged from behind the screen.

Everyone present paled the moment they saw the newcomers.

The person who appeared was Bailey, the foreigner who had been pursuing Song Qiuwan.

Asian.

He walked from behind the cigar-smoking man to the front of the group. After looking around, Bailey's gaze fell on Song Qiuwan.

His eyes gleamed with burning desire.

His schemes against Song Qiuwan were real, but so was his pursuit of her; and his affection for her was undeniable.

"Boss, can I have this one?" Bailey turned to the cigar-smoking man, pointing at Song Qiuwan.

"If you like her, take her," the cigar-smoking man said indifferently.

"Thank you, boss," Bailey said, his face beaming with delight, before quickly looking back at Song Qiuwan.

At that moment, Song Qiuwan's head was bowed, making her expression unreadable.

Bailey approached.

As he drew closer, Bailey's breathing became increasingly rapid.

He reached out, trying to grab Song Qiuwan's head.

Bang!!!

The next moment, a gunshot rang out in the villa.

Bailey looked down at the blood blooming on his chest. He turned in disbelief, and sure enough, met the boss's expressionless gaze.

"You?" Bailey pointed at the boss, increasingly incredulous.

"You've already been exposed. There's no need for you to exist. If it weren't for you, how could the organization have been exposed?" The boss exhaled a smoke ring.

Thump!

Bailey collapsed to the ground, lifeless, while the boss remained expressionless.

"The pharmaceutical group has been exposed, Boss Vera. Killing him won't help." The figure behind the cigar-smoking man took two steps forward and shook his head slightly regretfully.

Vera?

Du Qing's eyes widened, seemingly trying to gather information.

The cigar-smoking man named Vera, however, seemed unconcerned about them hearing his name. He stared at Du Qing and the others with a cold, unfeeling gaze, as if looking at a group of dead men.

Just as she was about to speak, the phone rang.

Interrupting Vera's words, Vera picked up the phone, her expression gradually darkening as she answered, "Okay, I understand."

Hanging up, she said to the man behind her, "Second brother, lock them in the solitary confinement room first. I'll handle the rest when I get back."

After saying that, the voluptuous woman behind Vera draped a coat over Vera's shoulders and hurriedly left.

Meanwhile, at this very moment...

The sign for Jena Pharmaceuticals shone brightly in the darkness, its illuminated logo flashing.

But this bright and dazzling company sign appeared somewhat dim amidst the flames.

The flames crackled and popped.

Whoosh!!!

In a two-story office across from the company building.

Looking at the burning building across the glass, the flames were reflected in Jiang Tian's calm eyes.

Yes.

It was Jiang Tian.

Beside Jiang Tian, ​​by the window, stood a middle-aged man.

His face was square, even his eyebrows were square, and his surname was Fang, giving him an extremely honest and simple appearance.

However, Jiang Tian knew that if he mistook him for an honest and simple person, he would be sorely mistaken.

Because this man was Du Qing's superior.

In that department, he was Du Qing's superior. Jiang Tian narrowed his eyes.

Fang Ming suppressed his slight shock.

After Jiang Tian contacted Du Qing, he was met with Du Qing's opposition.

Immediately, Jiang Tian contacted Gao Xiaolong, leveraging his existing connections.

Gao Xiaolong directly obtained Du Qing's superior's phone number for Jiang Tian. After Jiang Tian explained the whole situation and the potential risks,

unlike Du Qing, Fang Ming, as a more mature and experienced leader, realized the enormous problem.

However, by then it was too late.

Because during missions, contact is impossible, even with superiors. This is the unique nature of this department—everything is based on secrecy.

They don't even question the actions taken.

When Jiang Tian learned this, he finally understood why Du Qing was so arrogant.

Because it was terrifying.

The autonomy she possessed was terrifying.

And what shocked Fang Ming the most at this moment?

It was...

Upon arriving here, knowing he couldn't contact them, Jiang Tian said he had a way. He then led Fang Zheng directly to the pharmaceutical company building where the other party had already been exposed. Inside, he told Fang Zheng to wait for ten minutes.

Ten minutes later, the entire building…

At their first meeting, Jiang Tian gave Fang Ming a small shock.



Chapter 235 The notorious criminal appears, and the plan succeeds perfectly.


This is also the unique nature of this department.

Fang Ming, who considered himself well-informed and experienced, had seen and witnessed almost everything.

But this was the first time he'd ever seen anything like it.

He was mainly shocked by Jiang Tian's methods and procedures for handling the problem, and by his audacity.

Unable to find the culprit, unable to find the comrades in danger.

So, he simply burned down the culprit's hideout?

Fine, fine, you're playing it this way, huh?

Finding someone like this?

Fang Ming had already investigated Jiang Tian thoroughly before coming, or rather, after Jiang Tian found him and recounted the whole story, Fang Ming understood the problem perfectly.

Think about it, would someone who had made great contributions, someone with so many merits, really be afraid of death?

After investigating Jiang Tian, ​​was there any need to doubt such a comrade?

Because of Fang Ming's seriousness, he personally brought Jiang Tian to the office building.

"When I came here, I considered what method you would use. After all, Du Qing and the others couldn't possibly be here, since Bailey went out to meet his boss. I never expected you to come up with this method." Fang Ming was genuinely shocked.

It seemed this method was terrifying.

However, after careful consideration, Fang Ming realized with horror that if they really wanted to find the body as quickly as possible,

it was practically impossible and unrealistic.

In fact, finding the body was already the greatest mercy those criminals could show them.

But that's how the organization's rules are.

Although Fang Ming was the leader, she only issued tasks to her subordinates and instructed them on how to handle them, without interfering or even inquiring about the process.

Even after a task was completed, a detailed record was left, and she could be informed if there was any important assistance during the mission.

But she wouldn't interfere with the specifics of the task.

This was because she didn't even know the location where Du Qing was carrying out the mission.

Regardless of the circumstances...

“This method will definitely lure out their key figures, and then, by following them, we can find their final hideout.”

“This way of thinking is unconventional, yet it uses the simplest methods. The most terrifying thing is that it doesn't even cause any chaos when we enter.”

Thinking this, Fang Ming's heart raced slightly.

Such talent is practically born for their organization!

Fang Ming's eyes grew brighter.

Sure enough.

As time passed.

Finally, a fire convoy arrived quickly in front of them, and simultaneously, another convoy pulled up at the company entrance.

From the convoy stepped a leader-like figure, dressed in a suit and tie, followed by a large group of people.

“They've arrived,” Fang Ming said, his eyes shining.

Although they had come alone, they had backup here.

They could call in more manpower at any time, all of them elite personnel.

Jiang Tian glanced at it sideways and shook his head, saying, "No."

At this moment, Jiang Tian's scanning radar was constantly on, and not even a red dot appeared in the radar.

In other words...

These people don't even have any criminal records.

The foreigner who appeared in the country before was a red dot on the radar, something Jiang Tian had never seen before.

But the people appearing now haven't even committed any crimes.

"No?" Fang Ming was surprised.

Because with so many people coming, there couldn't possibly be no leader!

Even in the deepest darkness, some light can emerge.

Sure enough.

A department is a mixed bag.

There are incompetent people, but there's no denying that there are definitely elites within it.

And the fact that Fang Ming trusted him told Jiang Tian that

Fang Ming was truly not simple.

This old fox is shrewd.

Jiang Tian was thinking to himself.

On Jiang Tian's scanning radar, the one only he could see, a red dot appeared.

This red light was so terrifying that it even caused Jiang Tian to subconsciously squint.

He was completely hallucinating from the red light.

This is a bit too much!

Fang Ming was dumbfounded.

Then he followed Jiang Tian's gaze and looked in one direction.

It was a small alley.

However, at this moment, there was almost no one outside the alley, and it was pitch black inside, so he couldn't see anything.

Chapter 236 Encountering Love Through a Transfer: Heavenly Skill Delivered to One's Door?

Even with such an important company on fire.

when suddenly, she saw it.

Right across from her.

Very well.

His pharmaceutical company was a legitimate, large company!

The entire office building belongs to him.

At this moment, Vera vowed to tear the murderer to pieces.

So.

Vera simultaneously took a step forward.

Fine, fine.

The credit came so easily?

Chapter 237 Stunned, shocked, is this even human?


*Smack!*

Jiang Tian slapped Vera hard across the face, sending her crashing to the ground with a dull thud.

Bang!!!

Jiang Tian now could be described as possessing a terrifying aesthetic in every movement, each attack exuding an incredibly smooth, effortless, and terrifying fluidity.

Especially the dull thud of the impact.

It was an indescribable aesthetic feeling.

Regarding speed, Fang Ming couldn't help but think of his past.

Once upon a time, he was a top-tier soldier, his combat and marksmanship unparalleled in the entire army.

His age had undoubtedly diminished his strength, but he was still far stronger than most active-duty young men.

Jumping from the second floor wouldn't be too difficult.

But then he found Jiang Tian had already entered the alley.

That speed?

That young man?

Holy crap?

Don't even mention now, even in his prime, he'd be instantly killed!

Hiss!!!

Jiang Tian.

Chapter 238 If they won't confess, then kill them.

"If you don't leave, how can I leave? If I leave, how am I supposed to explain to Lao Gao?" Fang Ming said hastily.

At this moment, cold sweat was pouring down Fang Ming's forehead.

If he didn't leave now, it would really be too late!

He had to wait.

He had to wait here for Jiang Tian.

Even if the risk was great.

How would Jiang Tian escape without a car?

Fang Ming was still frantically thinking to himself.

Fang Ming was stunned.

"You left?"

And then, along with that voice,

Boom boom boom!!!

A terrifying roar echoed above the villa.

Sure enough.

Jiang Tian's voice was calm as he smoothly operated the helicopter with one hand.

The whole movement was terrifyingly fluid.

But...

a problem arose.

Accompanied by a series of whooshing sounds.

Meanwhile,

not far away on the main road, four or five cars with flashing lights and whooshing sounds were already lined up and speeding towards them.

However, the vehicles' attention seemed to be focused on the helicopter, giving Fang Ming time to leave.

Meanwhile.

Above the helicopter.

Including Song Qiuwan and Du Qing, there were four people in total.

Jiang Tian had just had some bad luck. Actually, Jiang Tian was proficient in reasoning and logic, even incorporating micro-expression psychology.

Through Jiang Tian's observation, it was clear that Vera wasn't lying, nor did she have any ulterior motives.

This unexpected incident, even the disobedience to Vera's orders, clearly indicated a problem within Vera's internal structure—someone was plotting a rebellion!

Jiang Tian's entry was a coincidence, stumbling upon an ambush.

However, with Jiang Tian's skills and scanning radar, even if he initially saw the ambush, it didn't pose much danger.

After fighting his way in, relying on the scanning radar to locate the criminals.

Jiang Tian moved through a thin veil.

He pushed his way into the solitary confinement room Vera had mentioned, only to discover an armory in the adjacent room.

So.

As the helicopter took off.

BOOM!!!

A terrifying explosion followed.

A terrifying flame shot into the sky.

BOOM!!!

An even more terrifying shockwave exploded with a deafening roar.

Terrifying smoke and fire shot into the sky.

On the ground.

A terrifying mushroom cloud rose into the sky.

It spread from Vera's villa.

The terrifying flames were burning.

Who did this?

Who else could have done it?

Fang Ming's face turned deathly pale with fear.

In the helicopter, Jiang Tian, ​​however, calmly lowered the red remote control.

The terrifying explosion seemed to have no effect on Jiang Tian's mood whatsoever.

This scene was clearly witnessed by everyone present.

Especially...

The helicopter had already flown several kilometers away.

But even from that distance,

the terrifying flames were still clearly visible.

Chapter 241 Punishing Du Qing, Fang Ming's Furious Handling

Especially ashamed to face Jiang Tian.

They truly deserved to die!

Even if they died here, it would be their own fault.

Song Qiuwan and Du Qing stood not far away.

She knew.

This was her first mission.

In this eerily silent environment.

Before this, Fang Ming had no concept of Jiang Tian, ​​not even from the information he had.

You're still here, calmly puffing away on your cigarette?

So crazy, are you out of your mind?

Actually, on the way here, Jiang Tian had already upgraded his rebirth attribute.

Upgraded the green rebirth attribute to blue.

Although it was only a one-level upgrade, it didn't affect Jiang Tian's normal combat power.

The healing of his injuries was more than five times faster.

Now, granulation tissue had even started to grow.

In ten days at most, Jiang Tian felt that his injuries would be completely healed.

That's right.

This doesn't even include Vera's Sin Values.

This wave of gains is almost approaching Tucha's.

Current sin value: 110000

A full 110,000 sin values.

Exactly one hundred and ten thousand.

Exactly one hundred and ten thousand. Jiang Tian even seriously suspected that the system had deducted some of his sin values; otherwise, why would it be exactly one hundred and ten thousand?

Chapter 242 This explosive start, in this life, finally reaching the peak.

Buzz!!!

Even without saying anything.

Buzz!!!

That's right.

Very much power.

The identity of a squad leader in a special department.

His police rank is that of a third-level police inspector.

His grade is even higher, equivalent to a squad leader in the municipal police department, and now he's a squad leader in a special unit.

His father was about to become the Secretary of the Political and Legal Affairs Commission of Yunhai.

Chapter 243 I have let you down? Gao Xiaolong is furious.


At the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

Chapter 244 What? You say I'm getting arrogant? Well, do you know that I...

Now, even Lü Chun would dare to speak loudly!

This was practically divine.

Exactly.

He had never seen anyone so terrifying, so ruthless.

After Lü Chun's reminder, Jiang Tian seemed to finally realize what was happening, clutching the phone.

Jiang Tian hadn't paid attention earlier.

Because he hadn't thought about it at all.

Because the situation in Yunhai was now crystal clear.

The operation to apprehend drug traffickers was going smoothly.

Various achievements were piling up.

The scale of drug traffickers apprehended was constantly breaking historical records.

Externally, joint operations were being conducted with Myanmar.

Although there might be some risks, with the advantages of timing, location, and manpower, as long as they were a little careful, there shouldn't be any problems. Furthermore, headquarters was acting as the overall command center.

At the time, Jiang Tian had been a little uneasy, but it was purely overthinking.

He reflected on it afterward and realized he might have been overly sensitive. This advantage was like having a perfect hand after his rebirth—he didn't know how to lose.

Except for the same reckless and self-destructive actions he had before his rebirth.

But what he feared most came to pass.

Jiang Tian held the phone. Aside from the absence of Gao Xiaolong's voice, he heard the voices of Shen Han, Zhou Zhao, and even Jing Feifan on the other end.

Besides them,

he even heard the voice of Old Chen, the armed police officer.

Wait, are there really so many people gathered there?

Jiang Tian was still thinking when Shen Han's voice rang out: "Comrade Jiang is quite capable, it's not a big problem. After all, Comrade Jiang was injured, so it's inevitable that he would let his guard down."

"Heh, no need to argue. We didn't say anything. We don't deny Comrade Jiang's excellence, but he lacks experience and maturity. Promoting him rashly wouldn't help him, it would harm him," Jing Feifan's voice followed.

Song Liguo's voice rang out: "Bullshit! Comrade Xiao Jiang's contributions are right here. Those contributions were earned with his blood and sweat. Just because he lacks seniority, they have to be denied? Comrade Xiao Jiang was injured, what's the problem with that?"

"He's gone astray, that's undeniable. Under normal circumstances, it might be overlooked, but what time is it now? This is an emergency, and it's already caused a major blunder. Do you know how serious the risk is to our comrades in Myanmar every moment that passes? This kind of behavior absolutely cannot be tolerated. Or are you going to take responsibility for Jiang Tian's serious consequences? If you can, I won't say a word," Jing Feifan said menacingly.

"Fine, fine."

Although the conversation was brief, Jiang Tian understood the underlying meaning.

It was because he didn't answer the phone that serious consequences occurred.



Chapter 245 Everyone was stunned; after all the cursing, you were suspended!


“Xiao Jiang, you shouldn’t have forgotten even the most basic rules and regulations,” Gao Xiaolong sighed deeply.

“What rules and regulations?” Jiang Tian had only heard the gist of it, and through a combination of guesswork and deduction, he had only grasped a small part of the situation.

But what did it mean that he had violated the rules and regulations?

He wouldn’t take the blame for something that wasn’t his fault, no matter what.

When Jiang Tian’s voice rang out, everyone in the city bureau seemed to erupt in chaos. Even Gao Xiaolong was caught off guard, never expecting Jiang Tian to ask such a question.

Jiang Tian.

Are you crazy?

Or has he really gotten so arrogant that he thinks he can ride on everyone’s heads just because he’s injured?

Sure enough.

The moment Gao Xiaolong looked up.

The entire city bureau, everyone around, seemed to have their heads explode.

Jing Feifan’s face even showed an expression of wild joy.

However, Jing Feifan concealed it well; his surprise was fleeting.

"Look, everyone, look! This is Jiang Tian's attitude! Even if he's capable, this kind of attitude is an insult and a disgrace in our department, where heroes fight without fear!" someone eagerly chimed in.

"Officer Jiang, how can you say that?"

"Yes, it's too much!"

"Even if he's injured, Officer Jiang, even if he can't do it himself, could at least offer some advice! If he had acted sooner, perhaps fewer comrades would have died. Officer Jiang has gone too far!"

Even his own people from the Municipal Bureau couldn't help but stand up and launch a frenzied attack.

"Enough!"

At this moment, Gao Xiaolong, his face flushed red with anger, roared, and all the commotion abruptly ceased.

After a moment of silence, Gao Xiaolong's gaze turned icy, filled with complex and profound disappointment. He spoke into the phone, "Comrade Jiang, you've disappointed me far too much. Do you even know what happened at the Municipal Bureau? I just mentioned the most basic rule: phones must be available 24/7, and you must be on call at any time. That's a red line. Can you really ignore that? Can you really disregard it?"

The more he spoke, the angrier Gao Xiaolong's voice grew.

His anger was becoming increasingly palpable.

"What happened at the Municipal Bureau?" Jiang Tian asked calmly.

He showed no sign of panic.

But this only made things worse. Gao Xiaolong slammed his fist on the table, the table creaking under his weight, a testament to his fury: "Last night's operation suffered a serious setback. Except for a handful of people who escaped, almost everyone else is trapped overseas."

*Crack!!!*

Inside the triangular official car, Jiang Tian instinctively crushed the bottle of mineral water he was holding.

The unopened bottle spilled onto the floor.

Lu Chun, sitting in the driver's seat and glancing sideways at the scene, almost collapsed to his knees upon seeing this.

Damn it, that was an unopened water bottle!

A casual flick of the wrist, a moment of emotional impulse, and he crushed it.

If that had been on a person, ugh… Lu Chun's face turned pale.

Now, Lü Chun was convinced that if Jiang Tian hadn't held back, that kick would have easily killed him.

Sitting in the passenger seat, Chu Jing's brow twitched wildly.

A monster.

No, he was practically a prodigy.

Chu Jing was already twenty-seven years old.

She considered herself quite accomplished, having fought her way through the military before joining this mysterious department and wielding considerable power.

Even as an ordinary member, her power was ridiculously large.

Her skills were not weak, but compared to Jiang Tian...

Chu Jing felt a chill run down her spine.

Of course, their expressions didn't attract Jiang Tian's attention at all.

Because at this moment, the most important thing for Jiang Tian was...

"Has Yangyang returned?" Jiang Tian asked in a low voice.

That's right.

If he remembered correctly, Gao Yangyang had also participated in this operation.

If something had happened to Gao Yangyang...

Jiang Tian's eyes flashed with a terrifying, murderous light.

What he feared most had come to pass.

With perfect timing, location, and support, how could they fail?

And so miserably?

Fools.

That's right.

Besides Li Qishan, that fool, Jiang Tian couldn't think of any other reason.

Gao Xiaolong explained slightly, "Most of the people who went to headquarters were trapped, a small number were killed, Yangyang led her men to break out immediately and luckily escaped, but they're currently at headquarters."

Jiang Tian knew about this.

Hearing that Gao Yangyang was alright, Jiang Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Wait a minute.

Gao Yangyang being alright didn't mean the others were alright.

For example, Zhao Wei and Li Zijin.

These were all close team members of Jiang Tian's.

There was also Captain Guo and Captain Wei.

Especially Wei Xun; their relationship might not have been great before, but after getting to know him, Jiang Tian's impression of Wei Xun was definitely good.

In other words, the subtext of Gao Xiaolong's words was almost clear.

"Now do you know how serious this problem is? This just happened this morning. I personally called you so many times, rushed here from Kyoto, even went to the hospital to look for you, but I couldn't find you. Xiao Jiang, you've disappointed me so much. At a time like this, even if you're injured, even if you don't leave the hospital, you shouldn't have disappeared so completely. You couldn't even keep your phone accessible." Gao Xiaolong's anger was boiling.

This was a most basic rule, and also the most important rule.

Twenty-four hours a day, you must be available at any time.

No one can violate this rule.

This applies to all anti-drug police officers.

The level of importance attached to this is even lower than that of criminal investigators.

Only on this basic rule, criminal investigators can do it sooner or later.

Those who openly cause trouble are ultimately a minority.

If criminal investigators rank second in terms of the danger level of all departments, then anti-drug officers are precipitously number one.

You absolutely must return to the team to carry out the mission immediately upon receiving a phone call.

This is true even under normal circumstances.

Especially when such a serious problem, such a major incident, occurs.

If you can't get through on the phone, and you can't be found in person, even if you're injured, you could at least offer some advice!

After all, you have extensive experience in drug enforcement, and your experience in operations deep overseas is also extremely rich. You can provide some insights into the enemy's terrain and other aspects.

Some of these insights might be enough to save these colleagues.

“Xiao Jiang, you can't even follow the most basic rules and regulations. You've utterly disappointed me. You're not even as good as a qualified narcotics officer.” Gao Xiaolong's voice grew increasingly low, and a fire of anger burned within it.

But the next moment…

Jiang Tian's voice rang out silently: “Chief Gao, I'm sorry to disappoint you. I'm not qualified to go to the Municipal Bureau right now because I was just suspended from duty not long ago. Now, I'm not even a narcotics officer, let alone an excellent one, a narcotics hero suspended indefinitely?”

“Even so you… um?… wait, what the hell did you say?”



Chapter 246 Approaching the Truth, Gao Xiaolong's Fury


Jiang Tian sat in the back seat of the car. A luxury car is a luxury car; it was truly comfortable. Jiang Tian had never experienced anything like this in either his past or present life.

His past life was so miserable. Although his life had changed after his rebirth, and he had money, speaking was too difficult, and he never had time to rest.

He was either on the move or fighting enemies. Now, Jiang Tian had just dealt with a problem with a foreign criminal organization, although it wasn't completely resolved.

For example, although he had captured Vera, how to deal with him, the entire distribution network of domestic drug trafficking, and how it spread—these were all serious and unresolved issues.

Gao Xiaolong's words made Jiang Tian straighten his back slightly, and his gaze gradually calmed.

To be honest, Jiang Tian's mindset was much more peaceful now.

Too much fighting and killing really does make people kinder.

At least, Jiang Tian felt he was kind.

Of course, if Lü Chun and Chu Jing, who were sitting in the seats in front of him, knew Jiang Tian's thoughts, they would probably be furious with him.

Regardless of what others thought, Jiang Tian had now managed to control his emotions quite calmly.

He remained remarkably composed in the face of Gao Xiaolong's angry questioning.

To be honest.

Jiang Tian had originally planned to go directly to Kyoto if things didn't work out here. After all, he was confident that his abilities would allow him to take off once he was at headquarters.

However, he hadn't even had a chance to go to Kyoto before he was directly placed in an even more prestigious department.

In fact, the power of this department was terrifyingly immense.

Of course, this was also related to the merits and achievements Jiang Tian had made. The recruitment of exceptional talent always comes with privileges; he was given the rank of captain/squad leader right from the start.

Jiang Tian was already very satisfied with this.

However, Jiang Tian couldn't bear the blame for this.

Don't even mention Jiang Tian being busy; even if he weren't on a plane, Jiang Tian has no obligation to be available 24/7.

Because.

He's been suspended indefinitely.

Who did it?

How did they do it?

Jiang Tian is too lazy to even look into it.

If he can't work here, he can't work anywhere else.

Wouldn't being a captain be better?

"Chief Gao forgot to tell you, before this, I was already suspended indefinitely. That's right, suspended. I'm no longer part of the anti-drug unit. I can't take the blame for this," Jiang Tian explained.

Suspended?

Buzz!!!

Really suspended?

Jiang Tian suspended?

Gao Xiaolong looked up in astonishment.

Then he noticed that many people's expressions froze instantly, especially those who had just accused Jiang Tian.

This means...

"You guys are suspending him indefinitely?!"

"Who did this?

How did they do it?"

Gao Xiaolong's head was buzzing, his gaze instantly fixed on Jiang Peng.

"That's right."

Although Jiang Tian hadn't said anything.

But Gao Xiaolong's first suspect instantly shifted to Jiang Peng.

He had long since figured out that this old man, seeing his son in danger amidst gunfire, was using some excuse to suspend him for his son's safety.

For example, this injury—he used the injury as a pretext to suspend Jiang Tian.

"Fine, fine."

"So you're doing this, huh?

You're doing this to protect your son's safety, right?

Where do you put the Party and the country? Do you even care about them? Do you even care about the millions of people in Yunhai?

*Slap!*

Gao Xiaolong slapped Jiang Peng across the face in a fit of rage.

No matter the reason, Jiang Tian's suspension is absolutely inseparable from Jiang Peng's involvement.

Otherwise, who would suspend Jiang Tian for such merit?

If it wasn't you who suspended him, then it's even more serious.

Are you, the bureau chief, just sitting around doing nothing?

"Chief Gao," Jiang Peng said, completely bewildered by the slap.

"Little Jiang has been suspended?" Gao Xiaolong asked grimly.

What does this mean?

How great and serious is the sacrifice this time?

It can't be said to be unprecedented.

But the losses are absolutely devastating; the figures we have so far are already shocking."

It was practically like walking right into someone else's trap.

The most crucial issue was...

In this regard...

Although both headquarters and provincial departments had numerous experts, many lacked real-world experience, especially experience deep within Myanmar.

Jiang Tian, ​​however, possessed an astonishing intuition in this area.

Starting last night...

Then, they immediately launched a joint operation.

Soon after, they walked into the trap and were almost completely wiped out.

This was utterly audacious and utterly ruthless; a mere group of drug traffickers, a group of criminals, yet they dared to act so brazenly.

Many experts at headquarters were completely taken aback.

Gao Xiaolong had been trying to contact Jiang Tian at the time.

Actually, Jiang Tian had already changed his phone.

His own phone had been switched off when he boarded the plane to leave the country.

He switched to a satellite phone given to him by Fang Ming, allowing him to communicate anytime, even abroad.

Jiang Tian only turned his phone back on after returning and disembarking.

Meanwhile, Gao Xiaolong's lips were covered in ulcers from anxiety, and he was so agitated that they were blistered. From the moment the incident occurred, he had taken a connecting flight directly from Kyoto to the Municipal Public Security Bureau.

Then, he rushed to the hospital in a car, seething with anger. Once inside, his rage intensified because Jiang Tian wasn't there.

Gao Xiaolong was absolutely furious.

When he needed him most, he couldn't find him anywhere!

Gao Xiaolong was even more anxious.

Very anxious and furious.

Especially since last night, apart from Gao Yangyang and a few others who had escaped, everyone else had gone missing.

This undoubtedly meant the odds were against them; every moment of delay

increased the danger.

Song Liguo didn't go because the Municipal Public Security Bureau still had many issues to handle. While the problem of overseas drug traffickers was serious, the aftermath of Jiang Tian's recent arrests of drug lords was equally important. Even a small-time drug dealer could cause terrifying and immense harm.

Otherwise, even Song Liguo would likely be in grave danger.

However, the Municipal Public Security Bureau had mobilized 80% of its anti-narcotics police!

Even headquarters had drawn some personnel.

In addition, there were people from the Criminal Investigation Division, and so on.

To ensure absolute success, even the armed police mobilized a portion of their forces, demonstrating their immense determination to eliminate the Yun family and deter others in Myanmar.

This also meant completely eradicating the Yun family, this criminal syndicate and a scourge.

However, the more personnel deployed, the more devastating the consequences would be.

Furthermore, based on Jiang Tian's past experience,

if Jiang Tian were present, he might have a solution.

Even if Jiang Tian were to intervene, reinforcements could arrive quickly.

This meant that every moment of delay meant more casualties, and Gao Xiaolong was understandably furious.

"Chief Gao, it wasn't me who suspended him. I objected initially, but no one listened to me," Jiang Peng nearly vomited blood.

This matter truly had nothing to do with him.

In fact, Jiang Peng was the last to know when it was announced at the meeting.

Sure enough, after these words, Gao Xiaolong's expression hardened further.

Anger was building within him.

You dare suspend even such a meritorious official?

What wouldn't you dare to do?

Gao Xiaolong was furious.



Chapter 247 Fang Ming is furious: Who dares to frame our hero?


At this moment, seeing the situation turning sour, Jing Feifan quickly stepped forward to explain, "Chief Gao, even if he's suspended, doesn't he have any sense of responsibility? Sure enough.

That's right!

It seems.

Jiang Tian's perspective wasn't that low.

Sure enough.

As Gao Xiaolong finished speaking, Lü Chun, who had been driving at an average speed of almost 80 or 90 km/h, arrived at the bureau's entrance, standing beside a grim-faced Fang Ming.

If one were to ask...

what impression Jiang Tian left on Fang Ming's mind,

there would only be one: greatness.

Hero.

Prodigy.

Peerless monster.

Invincible powerhouse.

A gift from heaven.

Therefore.

After the car stopped in front of the Municipal Public Security Bureau, and they went inside,

Fang Ming overheard their conversation even from the doorway of the conference room.

Not to mention anyone else, Fang Ming was furious.

They were incompetent themselves, yet they were shifting the blame onto others?

A classic case of shirking responsibility.

If Xiao Jiang were really in Yunhai, that would be one thing, but what was Yunhai doing?

Yunhai was abroad, fighting a life-or-death battle with criminal gangs overseas, and you're just going to shift the blame for your own mistakes onto a hero who's risking his life against criminal gangs abroad?

Bang!!!

Before Jiang Tian could say anything,

Fang Ming had already kicked the door open.

A huge, deafening sound.

In the Municipal Public Security Bureau's conference room, all the discussion instantly stopped, and everyone's eyes turned sharply to the door.

Zhou Zhao, in particular, who had just finished speaking, was the first to frown.

As a leader,

In reality, getting involved in this kind of thing was thankless work; it was better not to get involved.

However,

That was normal. Now that such a terrifying problem has arisen, Zhou Zhao has to step in to resolve it.

Zhou Zhao's appearance was accompanied by his secretary and other leaders from the city office, including Jing Feifan.

Standing at the front, Zhou Zhao's face was somewhat grim.

Kicking down the door?

And kicking down the door while he was speaking?

Zhou Zhao's face was almost dripping with gloom.

Gao Xiaolong also turned his head sharply. Everyone in the office had just been startled. Who among them wasn't a leader, who wasn't in a high position of power? They were always the ones kicking down doors; when had anyone ever kicked down theirs?

However, when Gao Xiaolong saw Fang Ming raise his foot, his face instantly filled with astonishment.

Some leaders remaining at the city bureau, such as Jiang Peng, Song Liguo, and even Old Chen from the armed police, all looked towards the door.

When they saw Jiang Tian, ​​their expressions changed.

Jiang Tian kicked down the door?

Thinking this, their hearts skipped a beat.

But when they saw that it was someone next to Jiang Tian who had kicked down the door, their tense expressions finally relaxed slightly.

“Jiang Tian, ​​what are you doing? Secretary Zhou is here! How dare you bring people to kick down the door?”

Zhou Zhao’s secretary’s face darkened, and he immediately scolded Jiang Tian, ​​“Apologize to the secretary right now.”

Actually, Jiang Tian recognized this secretary; they had met before.

When they first investigated the case, Zhou Zhao had gone to the scene, and Zhou Zhao’s secretary had accompanied him.

He was a man in his thirties, whom Jiang Tian remembered as quite nice; his name was Sun Feng.

When Jiang Tian left, it was this Sun Feng who saw him off, exchanged phone numbers, and even said he would invite Jiang Tian to dinner sometime.

Now, scolding Jiang Tian and demanding an apology was actually a way to smooth things over for him.

He even secretly winked at Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian nodded slightly, but said nothing. He knew Sun Feng actually wanted to befriend him.

In this world, Jiang Tian wasn't arrogant; some things, some friends—the more you knew, the better.

But while Jiang Tian saw it, Fang Ming didn't.

He started in the military, and after retiring, transferred directly to his current security department.

"Jiang Tian, ​​are you trying to rebel? Do you have no organization, no discipline?"

Jing Feifan's eyes lit up, and he eagerly stepped forward, angrily confronting Jiang Tian.

Jing Feifan now utterly hated Jiang Tian.

His position as third-in-command was gone.

At the Standing Committee meeting, he was even removed from his post, ending any hope of promotion.

Jing Feifan was filled with resentment!

In his plan, he would become third-in-command, then help Li Qishan control the Municipal Bureau, at which point he would have complete control of the situation.

But now?

He was gone.

He brought in Li Qishan, who wanted to reap the rewards, but it turned out to be a complete waste. The rewards were gone, and he didn't even know if he was alive or dead.

But he was the one who recommended him; he had to protect him, no matter what!

If Li Qishan took responsibility, he would be truly finished.

Now, Jiang Tian's repeated mistakes gave him an excuse to attack him.

"Rebellion?" Fang Ming stepped forward, a cold smile on his face.



Chapter 248 was revealed, causing a sensation. It turns out you are...


"Who are you, Jiang Tian? This is the Municipal Public Security Bureau. Unauthorized personnel are prohibited from entering. What do you want here with these unauthorized people? Tell them to get out!" Jing Feifan shouted angrily, pointing at Fang Ming.

But no one paid him any attention.

Because, the next moment, Gao Xiaolong came forward directly.

Fang Ming suddenly attacked without warning.

He slapped the unsuspecting Jing Feifan across the face.

Fang Ming took a running start, two strides, and a high kick sent Jing Feifan sprawling to the ground.

When Comrade Xiao Jiang was abroad helping us with our mission, his phone was always switched off. How could he be sulking? Chapter 249 Hey, where's Madam Jing? Where are the people I arrested?


As Gao Xiaolong's gaze swept over them, a deathly silence fell instantly.

Even the department head personally came to support you.

Pointing at Jiang Tian and berating him angrily.

Good heavens.

What is this? Besides being Jiang Peng's achievement, Zhou Zhao's achievements as the leader of Yunhai are also obvious.

The more merit Jiang Tian accumulates, the more benefits Zhou Zhao receives.

This means that under his leadership, he can unite comrades, is responsible, and has the ability to overcome all problems.

"Chief Gao, I admit I made a mistake. Your scolding was right, very well done. I've let down the people of Yunhai." Zhou Zhao's face showed an expression more painful than tears. He thought he had done enough.

After all, Gao Xiaolong had made him look so bad, and he had already admitted his mistakes.

But, the next moment, Zhou Zhao realized he had overthought things.

"For the sake of millions of people, you should resign even more." Gao Xiaolong said mercilessly.

Buzz!!!

Zhou Zhao stared at Gao Xiaolong in disbelief.

He hadn't expected Gao Xiaolong to be so ruthless.

No...

Zhou Zhao was startled, because he suddenly remembered something.

Zhou Zhao knew better than anyone: to rectify the problems. The first step was the Municipal Bureau, and then Jiang Tian's high-profile rise made him subconsciously forget about it.

But now, no, it wasn't over at all.

The so-called complete removal from office was not a lie.

The "thorough investigation" was no exaggeration.

Those above were perhaps truly enraged.

Whoosh!!!

Cold sweat poured down Zhou Zhao's forehead.

Even if Gao Xiaolong was an impartial and selfless person, he would never go so far as to push someone to the brink, especially in front of so many people and leaders—the kind of thing that would spread throughout the ears of everyone of importance in Yunhai the next day.

And the core of all this problems lay with, yes, Jiang Tian.

Initially.

Everyone thought it would just be a simple suspension for Jiang Tian; in fact, given his injury, a suspension was even more normal.

But ultimately, to everyone's surprise, this simple suspension would trigger such a terrifyingly large-scale problem.

Using this as an excuse to cause trouble.

Zhou Zhao saw through it immediately.

That's why he was sweating profusely.

Although Gao Xiaolong couldn't decide his position, Gao Xiaolong's attitude, to some extent, represented the attitude of the big boss!

At this moment, the room was so quiet you could hear a pin drop; no one dared to utter a sound.

Gao Xiaolong, seemingly oblivious, continued his phone call with Minister Tan: "It's someone named Li Qishan, the director of a branch office in Yunhai, a good-for-nothing who climbed up the ranks by connections."



Chapter 254 Boss Tan was dumbfounded. He was fine when he left, but he can't come back?


In short.

Gao Xiaolong had practically made up his mind.

Was he serious?

Zhou Zhao's heart skipped a beat.

Finally, he turned to look at Jing Feifan.

Of course, Gao Xiaolong had no interest in their feelings whatsoever.

"Any news from over there?" Gao Xiaolong asked.

Minister Tan didn't hide anything: "Initially, there were only a little over seven hundred, and the two sides were able to fight back and forth. However, nearby criminal forces have been continuously sending reinforcements. Now, the total number of enemies is probably close to a thousand, all of them armed militants."

"Is this even possible? Could it be that the foreign side is deliberately deceiving us?"

Gao Xiaolong was shocked because this was a serious matter. The most terrifying thing was that if the other side betrayed them, their hope of fighting in a foreign territory would be truly gone.

"Yangyang is currently secretly gathering information over there, and it's basically the same as what they said, with some differences, but nothing serious." Even Minister Tan was somewhat troubled at this moment.

How to handle it?

Send in a large army?

"It's simply unrealistic and impossible."

"What are you planning to do?" Gao Xiaolong frowned.

"To prevent an international conflict, we can only send a small force of no more than five hundred people," Minister Tan said slowly.

"Five hundred people? The enemy has more than five hundred people! And, as expected, the nearby criminal groups have all gone to support us. Fighting in a foreign land, without the right timing, location, or support—even if we go, what can we do?" Gao Xiaolong flatly rejected the idea.

Because if a second problem arises, the consequences would be unbearable for anyone.

"But if we don't go now, it won't be long before our entire force is wiped out. The foreign officials are unwilling to act, fearing it will provoke the criminal groups to act recklessly." Minister Tan spoke through gritted teeth.

As an official...

They've actually become so aggrieved.

They're actually afraid of criminal groups.

If Minister Tan hadn't given so many instructions, he would have thought his neighbor was lying to him.

"Xiao Jiang, do you have any ideas?" Gao Xiaolong looked at Jiang Tian.

At such a critical moment, why did they rush to Yunhai in person, even at that crucial time? It was all to find Jiang Tian.

Since he was capable of creating a miracle,

did Jiang Tian have some solution to this situation?

As Gao Xiaolong's voice rang out, the previously silent conference room instantly filled with stares directed at Jiang Tian.

The municipal bureau's conference room wasn't small, but Jiang Tian had been sitting on a bench on the periphery as an observer.

He even had a bandage on his hand.

Faced with Gao Xiaolong's question abruptly, Jiang Tian nearly froze, but quickly stood up and said, "Sir, we currently have very few leads. The only reliable information is that the enemy's numbers are around a thousand. I've looked into Yunjia Town; it's quite large and has complex terrain. If we lead men to infiltrate the mountains and conduct mountain warfare, while simultaneously trying to get support from the Burmese authorities, we should be able to protect ourselves."

To be honest,

if it were Jiang Tian, ​​he wouldn't do that. He was leading nearly three hundred men, not necessarily elite, but at least trained.

Compared to ordinary drug dealers, he was far superior. In a real fight, with Jiang Tian leading his men and others drawing fire from the front, he could easily overwhelm them.

But Jiang Tian was a special case.

For others, retreating immediately would be the top priority.

Gao Xiaolong nodded slightly upon hearing this analysis.

Because this was the optimal solution in the current situation.

"Is there a way to contact Li Qishan?" Gao Xiaolong asked Minister Tan.

On the other end of the phone.

At headquarters, a noisy argument erupted in the conference room.

This incident was very serious.

Because in the past, Yunhai hadn't even been able to solve its own problems.

When you can't even clean up your own mess, or are even filthy clean, how can you possibly have the time and energy to target these overseas criminal forces?

This operation, in a sense, also has a special meaning.

In its original intent,

the joint operation with Myanmar was also a show of force.

Headquarters planned this sweep, not only to deter criminal groups, but also for a deeper, more significant purpose.

To demonstrate its strength and capabilities to Myanmar, killing two birds with one stone.

But man proposes, God disposes.

In headquarters' view, a small Yun family was a piece of cake.

Especially after the joint operation between domestic police and overseas officials.

With nearly a thousand people, all fully armed, wiping out a group of criminals—no problem, absolutely no problem.

But they never dreamed that the leader wouldn't play by the rules.

The Myanmar officials waited at the agreed meeting point for almost a day without seeing anyone, and assumed they had been stood up.

After a barrage of questioning, sensing something was amiss, an investigation was launched.

As expected, and predictably, everyone involved was arrested.

The instant Minister Tan hung up the phone, Xu Poye burst through the door, his face contorted with rage as he loudly proclaimed.

Chapter 255 The terrifying shock of the chain reaction, and the subsequent tremors

Minister Tan's face turned pale.

This would have further deterred all criminal groups.

Because headquarters has already planned a standard route to ensure everything goes smoothly and without any unexpected incidents along the way.

Very well.

A disgrace.

Useless.

Why would there be such a piece of trash?

Buzz!!!

His voice and tone nearly exploded as he spoke, rising a thousand times higher.

Because this news was far worse, a thousand times more serious than the previous news.

Ultimately.

Without the other side's assistance.

Five hundred people?

Hiss!!!

This news.

Bad news one after another.

The situation is serious.

The problem is huge.

It’s no wonder Zeng Fan’s luck has exploded.

This is the third time he’s been captured in such a short time.

The talent selection process has run into trouble.

Xu Poye, standing nearby, almost instantly realized the answer and quickly said, “That's right, it's him, Song Liguo.”

That's right.

It's Song Liguo.

Besides Song Liguo, there are no other suitable candidates.

Of course.

Actually, these matters are no longer Jiang Tian's concern.

It exploded.

It really exploded.

This matter had truly blown up.

For instance, the current situation in Yunjia Town.

"The situation in Yunjia Town is very complicated. If we were to take action, there are at least 100,000 acres of land around Yunjia Town where drugs are being grown. These are harmful things. Of course, most importantly, this place is extremely difficult to storm because it's surrounded by plains. When I passed through here before, I had a significant conflict with the Yun family."



Chapter 256 A Rescue Mission: An Incredibly Difficult Task


Jiang Tian had vivid memories of Yunjia Town; the ground was covered in bright red flowers, but he knew they represented deadly crime.

Moreover, the most serious issue at the scene wasn't the drugs themselves. The most terrifying threat to Jiang Tian was that he needed to traverse nearly 100,000 acres of nearby plains, all planted with that kind of thing.

Jiang Tian pointed to a patch of plains on the sand map with a small stick.

The situation next door was extremely complex.

By expanding the situation in Yunhai by dozens of times and then looking at the situation next door, all the problems became clear.

That is, sometimes the authorities don't not want to intervene, but rather, intervention only creates bigger and more serious problems, like now.

If the large-scale operation fails, it will be a huge and terrifying blow to the authority of the authorities.

The Yun family is not a small force among these criminal groups.

This signifies one thing.

This was a crucial question.

A difficult problem.

Bang!!!

I'm giving you half a day to organize your manpower, and I've also transferred some personnel from headquarters."

Hiss!!!

Especially Zhou Zhao.

Why?

Because Zhou Zhao understood perfectly well.

At this point, nothing else mattered; the most important thing was ability.

Jiang Tian had helped him achieve political success.

And it was a brilliant achievement.

He only needed to do nothing, and these achievements—the crime rate in Yunhai plummeting and numerous criminal groups being busted—were enough for Zhou Zhao to advance further.

These brilliant achievements were even enough for Zhou Zhao to advance further.

Zhou Zhao's mentality is on the verge of collapse.

Because the bigger the trouble Li Qishan caused, the more terrifying the consequences would be for him as the recommender.

It was obvious.

Gao Xiaolong immediately reinstated him to his original position. Who could disobey Gao Xiaolong's orders? Who could possibly disobey them?

No.

Jiang Tian narrowed his eyes. Perhaps they've already been deployed.

They must have been deployed the moment they received the news, before he arrived.

The most likely explanation is that the secret force has made its move.

But the final result is probably not good.

"Now, the latest appointments are being made. Song Liguo will be the on-site commander and primary leader of this mission. All instructions for this operation will be directed by Song Liguo. Remember, rescuing comrades is the top priority. As for the Yun family, if the situation is urgent, the task of annihilating the Yun family can be abandoned. The primary objective is to rescue our comrades," Gao Xiaolong quickly ordered.

Don't be fooled by the seemingly quick or simple action.

Because this involves direct confrontation, cooperation between the two sides, and the inevitable splits and reconciliations, the issues are extremely complex.

With Gao Xiaolong's order issued, the entire municipal bureau sprang into action like a war machine.

A large number of personnel, almost all of them, were urgently mobilized.

No one was allowed to take leave.

Even Jiang Tian received a call from Director Liao Ying midway through the operation.

Jiang Tian really didn't want to go to a hospital.

Just after Gao Xiaolong urgently coordinated the overall deployment and walked out of the conference room, Jiang Tian was standing by a flowerpot in the hallway, flicking the almost burnt-out ash into the pot, then slowly exhaling a smoke ring.



Chapter 257 These kinds of heroes are all mentally ill; what exactly are you all made of?


As Gao Xiaolong's voice rang out, Jiang Tian spoke into the phone, "Director Liao, I have an urgent mission, it's very important. I don't have time to go to the hospital for a check-up right now. You mentioned changing the dressing, forget it."

Jiang Tian looked at his arm. Although it was bandaged, it was a deliberate attempt to conceal his condition. For him, the bone had almost completely healed.

New granulation tissue had even grown on the surface of the flesh, indicating excellent recovery.

However, outwardly, with a white bandage around his neck and his most important right hand in a sling, he looked like he was in a terrible state and unable to perform his mission.

"Ready at any time," Jiang Tian replied with a salute.

Who would complain about not having enough merit?

With the special "God of Wealth's Blessing" attribute, each first-class merit would bring Jiang Tian enormous benefits. Based on the current rewards, each first-class merit would double his "God of Wealth's Blessing" earnings, and that didn't even include the special achievement mission rewards.

After collecting six first-class merit awards, the next reward is a Rolls-Royce.

A Rolls-Royce! That's completely legal income. All system profits are legal, and besides, Jiang Tian's income is continuous.

Because many criminals have high bounties, and these criminals were all exposed by Jiang Tian, ​​leading to the capture of many high-bounty criminals. Jiang Tian receives a portion of the reward for each of these captures.

If he performs well in this operation, Jiang Tian is even more greedy.

Look.

Look at this.

What is a hero? This is a true hero.

Bearing so many burdens, even being inexplicably diagnosed with mental illness by his superiors, being targeted like this, yet for his comrades, for the interests of his country, he still fearlessly went into battle despite his injuries.

This is a true hero, a hero worthy of being celebrated.

They really thought Jiang Tian had a good temper.

He didn't speak, simply because he didn't have the chance; Fang Ming had said everything for him.

This is also related to Li Qishan?

Otherwise, why would he have committed so many serious offenses?

You recommended such a beast, Jing Feifan! If you have a problem with me, or with Comrade Jiang, just say so! Why are you harming us like this?" Zhou Zhao roared.

"Leader Zhou, this is only his side of the story. Don't believe him," Jing Feifan hurriedly explained.

A son can be replaced.

A wife can be released.
