Especially in many places, with many ordinary people ignorant and uninformed, criminals exploit this ignorance, ultimately leading the local population down a path of no return—the reason why crime in Yunnan Province is so difficult to eradicate.

Yunhai bears a large part of the responsibility, but other areas are definitely not immune either.

Upon heading to the countryside, Jiang Zihao knew he was completely finished.

In that harsh environment, with virtually no future prospects, Jiang Zihao felt utterly lost. Just then, a bolt from the blue struck: his only hope, his father, was placed under investigation.

“Young Master Wen, this is all that beastly son of my second uncle’s. That bastard, relying on his connections with the leaders, was afraid his relatives would rise to power, so he maliciously had the leaders suppress me. Suppressing me is one thing, but that beast is so heartless, he even targeted his own uncle!” Jiang Zihao’s face was filled with anger and gloom.

Young Master Wen, however, held a wine glass, his face showing sympathy and surprise. “There are such vicious relatives?”

Jiang Zihao felt even more depressed.

In an instant, Jiang Zihao turned his gaze to Young Master Wen: "Young Master Wen, save me, save my family! Only you can help us now."

"This puts me in a difficult position!" Young Master Wen said hesitantly.

Jiang Zihao wasn't stupid, and immediately said, "As long as you can help my family, help get my father out of jail, and let me return to the provincial capital, I will be your dog from now on, doing whatever you ask."

"Really?" A smile finally appeared on Young Master Wen's lips.

"Absolutely." Jiang Zihao's face was full of obsequiousness, a far cry from the arrogance he displayed towards Jiang Tian.

"Fine, I want you. Kill Jiang Tian. Can you do that?" Young Master Wen finally revealed his true colors.

Jiang Zihao's eyes widened. Kill him?

This made his heart pound.

"Such a vicious relative! Even if I get your father back, he won't let it go. He might even try to get rid of you. Then I'll have wasted resources and lost everything!" Young Master Wen said slowly, sipping his red wine.

"Bottoms up."

"Young Master Wen, I'll do whatever you ask. That beast deserves to be torn to pieces. He deserves to die."

Jiang Zihao downed his wine in one gulp.

Young Master Wen stood up, straightened his flamboyant demeanor, and turned elegantly with a smile: "Since that's the case, our cooperation is complete. All the equipment you need, firearms, etc., I can provide. Kill him, and I'll take care of everything for you."

His tone remained unchanged.

His demeanor was still that of a refined scholar.

He exuded an air of nobility.

Young Master Wen was a big shot in Jiang Zihao's eyes.

His family's conglomerate had a vast and intricate network spanning various industries in Yunnan Province. Even the provincial leaders dared not lay a finger on them. One could imagine the terrifying power of the Wenye Group.

And the Wenye Group only needed to lift a finger, and they could be safe and sound.

"You beast, this is all your fault, you forced me to this," Jiang Zihao thought through gritted teeth, bowing respectfully as he watched him leave.

He seemed to be trying to save face.

Young Master Wen took two steps, then simply waved his hand. Immediately, a bodyguard in a suit rushed over, listening intently.

"Did you catch that girl?" Young Master Wen asked calmly.

"She was home with her classmate today, so we didn't have a chance to act. But please rest assured, Young Master Wen, we'll act as soon as her classmate leaves," the bodyguard replied respectfully.

Young Master Wen wiped his mouth expressionlessly. As he turned to leave, his voice gradually rang out: "Yunhai cannot tolerate such a powerful figure."

"This is Young Master Wen."

"A figure from heaven!"

Jiang Zihao stood on the table, watching this seemingly celestial figure leave with elegant steps. At that moment, he seemed to have made up his mind completely.

Following such a powerful figure was his opportunity. If he missed it, he would have to wonder if this was his only chance in this life.

But then, in the next moment...

"Who are you? What do you want?"

A hoarse and shrill voice rang out.

Jiang Zihao recognized the voice.

He was still confused, wondering who it was.

The next moment...

Boom!!!

Just then, a figure suddenly flew backward from around the corner.

Thump!!!

The figure landed right in front of Jiang Zihao.

The bodyguard not far from him was the first to react, but even he was stunned to see the figure lying on the ground groaning in pain.

If the bodyguard was like this, imagine how Jiang Zihao felt.

His mind was reeling.

Seeing Jiang Zihao, who had been so aloof just a moment ago, now lying on the ground howling like a stray dog, was a stark contrast.

The difference was so drastic it almost seemed like a dream.

But then, Jiang Zihao took a step back in terror.

Who was it?

Who on earth was it?

Has someone gone mad?

In this sea of ​​clouds, someone actually dared to lay a hand on Young Master Wen?



Chapter 337 Outstanding Achievements, A Dazzling Display


Before Jiang Zihao could react, footsteps began to echo from around the corner.

Sometimes, Jiang Tian had to admit just how terrifying his superhuman abilities were.

From a distance, Jiang Tian had been monitoring the situation and was surprised to discover that his cousin, Jiang Zihao, was involved with Wen Lang. Therefore, Jiang Tian hadn't acted immediately, wanting to hear their conversation.

When he heard Wen Lang luring Jiang Zihao to attack him, Jiang Tian expressionlessly cursed, "Idiot."

He didn't even know who the murderer was. His father had been framed by this Wen Lang, and yet Wen Lang was still trying to curry favor with him. Of course, this might be a setup, but it didn't matter to Jiang Tian.

Because immediately afterward, Jiang Tian was enraged.

"Little girl?"

"Which little girl?"

"Jiang Xiaoyu?"

"Or...."

Jiang Tian's mind flashed to his third uncle's cousin.

Jiang Xiaoyu is relatively safe now because she's protected by some well-trained individuals. If these criminals were to go up there, they'd just be easy prey.

But what if the most dangerous situation were...

That's right, her cousin from her third uncle's family.

Jiang Tian's gaze sharpened, but he also understood.

Drug trafficking organizations are different from other crimes; they are truly organized and premeditated, composed of a group of desperate criminals.

Such criminal forces, driven by revenge, will not hesitate to retaliate against anyone, regardless of kinship. Given the opportunity, they'll take revenge on even distant cousins.

In his previous life, Jiang Tian worked in the archives, and with over ten years of experience, he had witnessed such things more than once.

Back then, he was furious.

After experiencing it firsthand, Jiang Tian was even more enraged.

Even a clay figure has some temper.

So, the instant Wen Lang appeared, Jiang Tian acted. His kick was earth-shattering; if Jiang Tian hadn't needed to capture him, this kick would have killed the so-called Young Master Wen instantly.

*Thud!*

The next moment.

Jiang Tian, ​​wearing leather shoes, stomped on Young Master Wen's face, blood flowing from his mouth.

No matter how much Young Master Wen struggled.

"You beast! This is Young Master Wen! Are you crazy? Young Master Wen is the son of the Wenye Group! Do you want to die?"

Jiang Zihao, watching from the side, was furious.

How dare this beast!

Does he really think he can act recklessly just because he has connections?

"Shut up!!!"

The next moment, Jiang Tian coldly shouted, raising his leg and kicking Jiang Zihao in the face, sending him spinning three and a half times in the air before he collapsed to the ground.

After doing all this...

Jiang Tian then looked at the bodyguard.

[Eye of Judgment]

[Zeng Feng, Sin Value 1580, butler under the Wenlang Crime Group, most recent criminal record: sold 50 kilograms of heroin three days ago. The heroin came from...]

"Arrest him," Jiang Tian said directly.

At that moment.

Lü Chun, who had already caught up with Jiang Tian, ​​took the lead.

Do what you love.

It must be said that Lü Chun's abilities are quite good. Initially, he had a problem with Jiang Tian, ​​but after being impressed by him, he followed him to the anti-drug squad and even frantically studied anti-drug issues during this time.

Now, he's incredibly skilled in drug enforcement, even arguably on the verge of surpassing Zhao Wei and becoming Jiang Tian's top henchman.

Zeng Feng, the bodyguard, saw this and his expression completely changed.

Without a moment's hesitation, he quickly drew his gun, but before he could even raise it...

Bang!!!

Jiang Tian fired a shot.

A marksmanship contest?

Whether within three steps or beyond, Jiang Tian was second to none.

The bullet pierced Zeng Feng's shoulder, and the pistol fell to the ground.

Lü Chun and Zhao Wei immediately tackled the bodyguard, handcuffing him instantly.

Jiang Zihao, still stunned and bewildered, shook his head, clutching the sharp pain in his chest, struggling and trembling as he tried to stand.

But when he looked up, he saw Jiang Tian holding a gun, the muzzle black and smoking—his target.

It was him.

*Buzz!!!*

Jiang Zihao's mind exploded.

But the next moment, before Jiang Zihao could react,

*Snap!!!*

Jiang Zihao stared blankly at the handcuffs on his hands.

*Gulp...*

He swallowed hard.

"I'm from the Special Operations Team of the Municipal Narcotics Control Detachment. This is my identification. You are now officially under criminal detention for drug-related crimes." Chu Jing expressionlessly flashed her identification.

As for the even more terrifying identification, Chu Jing didn't show it, afraid of scaring Jiang Zihao to death.

"Brother Jiang, no, don't joke like that." Jiang Zihao's voice trembled as he looked at Jiang Tian.

But unfortunately, Jiang Tian sneered, "Joking? Who's joking with you? The young master of Wenye Group, hehe, this guy is a big drug lord."

"A big drug lord?" Jiang Zihao's mind buzzed.

Unfortunately, Jiang Tian didn't give him a chance to speak. Looking down at Wen Lang's barely conscious state, his face expressionless, as if he were holding a corpse, he flipped Wen Lang over and handcuffed him behind his back.

"Boss, you're awesome! That kick was amazing!" Zhao Wei gave a thumbs up.

"Stop bragging, get to work. Take them all away and let the city police handle the aftermath," Jiang Tian said.

The shooting had caused some chaos at the Michelin restaurant.

It was dinnertime.

The Michelin restaurant was quite crowded, and everyone there was from Yunhai; most were at least somewhat wealthy.

The cleanup needed to be handled properly.

But...

Just then...

Jiang Tian's scanning radar suddenly issued a warning.

Then, a person with a flashing red dot stopped not far from the Michelin restaurant.

"Zhao Wei, clean up the mess."

Jiang Tian hurriedly left these words and quickly turned to leave.

What a joke.

This is a major achievement!

Jiang Tian has accumulated quite a few merits. Among them, the medal for his meritorious service overseas hasn't been awarded yet, and the nomination for First-Class Heroic Model has officially begun the process.

According to Gao Xiaolong, the announcement will be made soon, and Jiang Tian's First-Class Heroic Model medal and certificate will be issued shortly.

On the other hand, there's the matter of rescuing Elder Mu and Su Tong in Yanjiang.

Normally, rescuing one person would at most earn a third-class merit, a token gesture.

If it's very dangerous, difficult, and has a significant impact, then it's a second-class merit.

But the identities of Elder Mu and Su Tong were a lifesaver for the entire Yunnan Province.

The province even directly commended Jiang Tian.

This attracted the attention of the General Administration, and according to Gao Xiaolong, his sixth First-Class Merit was on its way.

In total,

Jiang Tian now possesses five First-Class Merits and one Special-Class Merit, in addition to his Second-Class Merit and Third-Class Duty.

Plus the Anti-Drug Vanguard Medal, and the soon-to-be First-Class Heroic Model and sixth First-Class Merit Medal.

Jiang Tian's title of "Six Merits King" will soon be changed, perhaps even becoming "Seven Merits King."

Is he satisfied?

Jiang Tian is not satisfied at all.



Chapter 338 Su Tong is cracked. Can I atone for my sins in this lifetime?


Having fallen to such a state in his past life, Jiang Tian, ​​in this one, will seize every opportunity to be perfect, to leave no room for error.

Reborn, he must do something.

Now.

Jiang Tian decides to completely eradicate drug crimes in Yunnan Province.

To completely eliminate heroin and other drugs from the entire province.

Whoosh!!!

Upon exiting the house, Jiang Tian's gaze immediately fixed on a figure.

It was a man, a man in his forties.

Standing under a streetlamp, watching the Michelin-starred restaurant, he initially feigned composure upon seeing Jiang Tian emerge and locking onto him, attempting to deceive him.

But unbeknownst to him, at this very moment, the red light in Jiang Tian's radar had turned a deep, almost purple.

Jiang Tian, ​​equally unmoved, hands in his pockets, approached leisurely.

But just then.

Click!!!

The sound of a car door opening rang out.

The next moment.

"Officer Jiang, what a coincidence!"

Su Tong's voice rang out. She then opened the car door with a reserved air, but her face couldn't hide her joy and happiness.

What girl doesn't dream of love?

Su Tong was no exception.

Although she had often received pursuit and care from Ye Xuan in the past, Su Tong had never had any real relationship with him initially.

She only felt he was a friend she could talk to, and as she grew older, she gradually and intentionally avoided him.

Until right after graduating high school and returning to her family home, Su Tong hadn't contacted Ye Xuan for four years; their relationship had completely faded.

If it weren't for this unexpected event, Su Tong might have been deceived by Ye Xuan's sweet words, but now Ye Xuan was still in solitary confinement at the city police station.

And Jiang Tian was rescuing her.

In that crucial moment, he stepped forward, pulling her out of the brink of death, and in that fleeting moment, he took away her first intimate encounter.

Her state of mind subtly shifted.

Seeing Jiang Tian again, the initial terrifying guilt transformed into something more profound. Su Tong felt a burning desire to make amends.

Seeing the face she had longed for day and night for the past few days, Su Tong suppressed her pounding heart.

Her eyes softened.

In the future, she would make amends for her mistakes; otherwise, she would have no face to live in this world.

But, as fate would have it, things don't always go as planned.

Jiang Tian's expression betrayed a desire to smile, yet he couldn't manage it.

Not far away.

Wen Lang's accomplice, who was keeping watch and trying to remain calm, was now only a few dozen meters away.

If Jiang Tian simply moved closer, he was confident he could slap him unconscious within ten meters.

But he couldn't resist Su Tong's greeting.

"Officer Jiang, are you still angry? Haven't you forgiven me? I know I made a mistake last time. Please give me a chance to make amends, okay?" Su Tong wasn't wearing a mask or hat this time.

Under the streetlights, in the twilight light.

Her seemingly watery eyes were fixed on Jiang Tian.

Her features were delicate and beautiful, but Jiang Tian read a precise message in those watery eyes.

Jiang Tian named it: Exquisite Stupidity.

Wow!!!

Sure enough, the person keeping watch might not have heard clearly the first time.

The second time, the person keeping watch completely changed their expression.

Then, under Jiang Tian's gaze, they cautiously backed away while keeping an eye on Jiang Tian, ​​simultaneously pulling out what looked like a cell phone from their pocket and making a few clicking noises behind their back.

After taking two steps back, they still felt uneasy, so they turned around, keeping a wary eye on Jiang Tian as they quickly moved, their pace accelerating until, in the blink of an eye, they were sprinting.

Jiang Tian reached out and placed his hand on Su Tong's shoulder, patting it lightly.

Su Tong's watery eyes looked at Jiang Tian with surprise and delight, her affection for him growing stronger.

"Officer Jiang, you've really forgiven me. I was overthinking things."

As Su Tong was still pondering this, Jiang Tian's voice rang in her ears: "Comrade Su Tong, thank you."

"Please don't say that. I just wanted to treat you to dinner, Officer Jiang. You're too kind." Su Tong was overjoyed; she could finally repay him a little, and it would ease her guilty conscience somewhat.

But the next moment, Jiang Tian's voice continued: "No, I should thank you for successfully doubling the difficulty of my anti-drug work."

Doubling.

That was Jiang Tian's conservative estimate.

His operation this time was simple, fast, and swift. Jiang Tian would rate himself at least 82 points, with the rest going to 666.

Next, he only needed to follow the clues and arrest them all, giving the Wenye Group no chance whatsoever. He could then gather all the clues and evidence and directly dismantle the entire Wenye Group's criminal forces.

But now.

It's exposed.

The information has undoubtedly been leaked.

During the operation, he had kept the scanning radar running the entire time to ensure a complete sweep.

"Huh?"

Su Tong's watery eyes hadn't yet processed what was happening.

The next moment, a gust of wind blew past.

It tossed Su Tong's bangs high into the air, and then, almost instantly, Jiang Tian vanished from her sight.

"The progress mission has doubled in difficulty?"

*Whoosh!*

Su Tong stood bewildered in the wind.

This sentence felt very off to her.

But when she saw Jiang Tian's back flash by, and then, in front of him, a figure ran frantically.

Su Tong understood.

While not exactly shrewd or clever, she wasn't stupid, nor was she truly naive.

In an instant, she realized that it was her mention of "Officer Jiang" that had exposed him.

*Whoosh!*

Su Tong's bewildered figure swayed precariously in the wind.

*Bang!*

Just then, a gunshot rang out.

Jiang Tian bent down.

With a soft thud,

the bullet struck the rear of the Rolls-Royce, a flash of light shooting through the darkness.

In Su Tong's eyes, the suspected fugitive, gun in hand, had fired without hesitation as he drew closer to Jiang Tian.

This made Su Tong's mind explode.

In that instant,

Su Tong felt a chill.

She wanted to die.

She didn't want to live anymore.

Her remaining life seemed destined to be an unforgivable sin.

She had let down her country, her nation, her people, and especially Officer Jiang, and everyone else.

"You're courting death."

Jiang Tian was startled.

It wasn't that he wouldn't fire initially.

It was just that the impact of the case had to be considered.

It was rush hour.

This was a busy street in the city center, the provincial capital.

People were coming and going.

The impact was significant.

Firing rashly was different from the secluded space inside a Michelin-starred restaurant; Jiang Tian really didn't want to be the protagonist in a police-criminal battle.

But the other party had the audacity to fire first in public.

Bang!!!

Jiang Tian fired a shot in return. The man knelt on the ground. The next moment, he pointed the gun at his temple as if to commit suicide, but Jiang Tian immediately followed up with a bullet, directly hitting the man's arm.

The pistol fell to the ground.



Chapter 339 Please give me a chance to apologize.


The Eye of Judgment!

[Wang Gang, a henchman of the Wen family criminal gang, with a crime value of 1200, latest intelligence: three minutes ago, he delivered information about the exposure of a key member of the Wen family's criminal gang.]

Jiang Tian glanced at the man.

At this moment, the crowd in the road had already parted to make way in fear.

Jiang Tian, ​​wanting to create more chaos, shouted loudly, "I'm a police officer, chasing a criminal. Don't be nervous!"

Hearing Jiang Tian's words, the chaotic crowd seemed to gradually relax.

Jiang Tian, ​​seeing this, also relaxed slightly.

After all...

Rumors can kill, especially since Jiang Tian was already quite high-profile. If his face were to appear in the news, he would truly become famous.

Fortunately, seeing that the people around him were relatively well-behaved, Jiang Tian completely breathed a sigh of relief and then walked directly to Wang Gang.

This was a man approaching forty years old.

When they saw Jiang Tian, ​​the man was still struggling to escape, but unfortunately, he had been shot in one leg and one hand, and could only drag himself up the stairs.

Jiang Tian followed behind, taking out the last pair of handcuffs.

Jiang Tian now always carried two or three pairs of handcuffs, just in case he ran out in an emergency.

With a click, another criminal was apprehended.

Over a thousand crime points were added to his account.

"Boss," Zhao Wei caught up from behind, panting.

"Take him away," Jiang Tian nodded calmly.

Having been shot twice, Jiang Tian didn't bother with immediate interrogation. He already had enough intelligence; all that was needed now was professional interrogators to pry open their mouths and get their confessions and identifications.

But it was clear that unless they were caught red-handed or had absolute evidence, these men would have a hard time confessing.

"Yes, sir!!!" Zhao Wei stepped forward and roughly escorted the man away.

At this moment, two black official cars had already pulled up in front of the Michelin restaurant.

Upon their arrival, they forced everyone into the vehicles, sealing the iron bars on the windows and blocking all escape routes and possibilities.

Having dealt with the situation,

Jiang Tian remained calm.

He wasn't in a hurry. Since they'd been discovered, there was no need to hide it anymore. He'd openly give the entire Yunnan province a small shock.

Meanwhile, Jiang Tian glanced at everyone with his "judgmental eye."

To his surprise, he found information about the location of the drug lab.

"Miss Su Tong, are you alright?"

At that moment, Jiang Tian thought of Su Tong not far behind him and asked without hesitation.

Without a doubt.

Whether Jiang Tian acted personally or the higher-ups decided to take action against the Wenye Group, for such a massive and terrifying behemoth, thorough preparations were necessary.

The most important thing was to have someone take over, and that person couldn't be weak, given that it involved various industries.

A mishap could easily trigger massive economic turmoil, plunging the already extremely impoverished Yunnan Province into an even worse predicament.

Although Jiang Tian was somewhat speechless at Su Tong's foolishness, he realized that if the Wenye Group collapsed, Su Zhenxing would undoubtedly be the one to take over.

What puzzled Jiang Tian was Su Tong's sudden change in expression.

Su Zhenxing stood beside Su Tong, repeatedly saying something, seemingly trying to comfort her. Su Tong, however, stared at Jiang Tian with teary eyes, biting her lip, her face contorted in bitterness.

"Miss Su, I didn't expect the criminal to be so brazen, firing a gun in the street. But I hope it didn't frighten you?" Jiang Tian asked with a slight smile.

Su Tong remained lost in thought, seemingly absorbed in her own world.

Su Zhenxing's lips twitched, and he sighed with a bitter expression, "Brother Jiang, I'm sorry to have caused you trouble."

Indeed.

Su Zhenxing had seen it clearly. Jiang Tian had been on a mission when his daughter excitedly got out of the car, called out "Officer Jiang" a few times, and then someone ran away frantically, firing a gun.

Clearly, it was Su Tong who had directly exposed Jiang Tian's covert operation, ultimately leading to him firing a gun in the street, nearly causing a major disaster.

"Oh, Miss Su, don't blame yourself too much. Although you did make the case a bit more difficult, the final result is still the same, just a little more troublesome," Jiang Tian comforted, reassuring this fragile little princess.

She really is a little princess.

Many people might not understand now, but how could Jiang Tian not? Coming from the future, he knew all too well how terrifyingly diversified the Tianxing Group had become.

Before Jiang Tian's transmigration, the Tianxing Group's assets had even reached trillions—assets, not liabilities.

If he hadn't transmigrated without a system, or if he had arrived too late to make amends, or if he hadn't entered this industry, Jiang Tian was prepared to directly beg Su Tong for favors.

This is a foolish, incredibly wealthy woman!

Even if Jiang Tian didn't have any ulterior motives, he still wanted to maintain some friendly relations, just in case he needed her in the future.

"Waaah, forgive me, I... I didn't mean to, I really didn't mean to."

The next moment...

Su Tong immediately hugged Jiang Tian's legs, squatted down, and began to sob.

For a moment, Su Tong felt utterly superfluous.

"No need, no need, it's not too much trouble," Jiang Tian quickly said.

"Really?" Su Tong looked up at Jiang Tian.

"Yes, yes, that's right," Jiang Tian nodded.

Su Tong stood up, and Jiang Tian then carefully observed her attire.

A floral dress, though she had added a leather jacket because it was a bit chilly.

She was tall, probably around 1.7 meters with her shoes on.

"Officer Jiang, please give me a chance to apologize, please."

Su Tong grabbed Jiang Tian's hand, her eyes sparkling, yet also pleading.

Staring into those large, bright eyes, Jiang Tian gasped, almost agreeing on the spot.

You know...

Before his body broke free of its restraints, it wasn't a problem, but as the saying goes, once the restraints are broken, there's no stopping it.

Jiang Tian is currently at the peak of his youthful vigor.

His entire body is bursting with energy.

When Su Tong shook his hand like that, Jiang Tian's eyelids twitched, and he almost blurted out that he wanted to take her to a hotel.

"As you just saw, I have an important mission, it won't be until at least midnight," Jiang Tian sighed.

His reminiscing now was only out of respect for Su Zhenxing, because Su Zhenxing could indeed bring significant development to Yunhai.

Of course, most importantly, Su Zhenxing's appearance gave Jiang Tian hope.

His past experiences were still deeply painful for Jiang Tian.



Chapter 340 Oh no, his daughter has become a simp, Su Zhenxing's mentality has collapsed.


Recalling his parents' experiences in his past life, especially his father's tireless efforts to please relatives, superiors, and colleagues, only to be turned away and even humiliated, those faces of disdain and avoidance dealt a heavy blow to Jiang Tian. It was then that Jiang Tian completely gave up.

Now, Su Zhenxing's appearance has given Jiang Tian an inspiration.

Originally, Jiang Tian planned to let his father reach the third-highest position in Yunhai and that would be enough.

But now, with Su Zhenxing's help...

Now, regarding promotions and reviews, what's most crucial? That's right, GDP. GDP equals your political achievements, and employment equals your merits.

As long as he holds onto GDP and merits, Jiang Peng might very well rise through the ranks in the future.

And Jiang Tian, ​​clearly, with this system, can't possibly waste his time in a local administrative department; the system itself prevents him from doing so.

Therefore, Jiang Tian's path is clearly fixed: reaching the top of the police system is enough.

But he could completely support his father's future!

That's right.

He wanted to make those who humiliated them in their past lives look up to him with disdain.

Those who hated them would now be begging to them.

And the key to all of this was Su Tong.

"Okay, it's a deal. Midnight tonight, see you then." Su Tong's sorrowful mood vanished instantly, and she gave Jiang Tian a wink.

This almost made Jiang Tian think he had just imagined it.

And he seriously suspected that the girl had done it on purpose.

"President Su." Jiang Tian looked at Su Zhenxing.

"Just call me Uncle, no one else will do, but I absolutely trust you." Su Zhenxing smiled.

What a joke.

With Jiang Tian by his side, would there be any danger?

Besides, Jiang Tian jumping into the river to save someone proved that his character was absolutely impeccable.

"Okay, Uncle Su, I have a mission, I'll go now." Jiang Tian's mind was preoccupied with the drug lab.

If he were to solve a major case...

Jiang Tian calculated that he would soon have accumulated seven First-Class Merits.

And what would the stamp-collecting reward be?

Of course, before that, Jiang Tian thought of a little girl.

When they were little, she would often follow him around, even offering him her favorite lollipop, just to get him to let her play with him.

Back then, Jiang Tian had been dismissive.

He even threatened her, his temper flaring.

In the blink of an eye...

Jiang Tian sighed. It had been almost ten years since they'd last seen each other, and now, upon meeting again, he was still bullying his cousin, getting his third uncle arrested.

“Little Jiang, there’s one more thing.”

Just as Jiang Tian was leaving, Su Zhenxing called out to him.

“Uncle Su, what is it?” Jiang Tian turned around.

“About that Ye Xuan,” Su Zhenxing said.

Jiang Tian frowned slightly. To be honest, Ye Xuan had indeed helped Su Tong before, although Su Tong now deeply disliked him. He didn't know Su Zhenxing's attitude, though.

"Comrade Jiang, my opinion is to handle this according to standard procedures. Deal with it as it should be handled. Don't hold back. It's my fault too; he fooled me with his charlatan act," Su Zhenxing said.

Jiang Tian breathed a sigh of relief and nodded. "Uncle Su, don't worry."

After Jiang Tian left,

Su Zhenxing's gaze gradually turned to the car.

Su Tong was sitting in the back seat. Through the car window, he saw Su Tong carefully writing a short message in the contact box below Jiang Tian's phone number.

Su Zhenxing's heart skipped a beat.

"Daughter," Su Zhenxing couldn't help but ask.

"Ah, Dad, what is it?" Su Tong hurriedly put away her phone.

"What were you doing just now?" Su Zhenxing hesitated for a moment before asking.

"Ah, I was here, I was here, telling Officer Jiang to be careful," Su Tong said quickly, her face slightly flushed.

Seeing this, Su Zhenxing, a seasoned businessman who had been around for years, knew perfectly well that his daughter was already deeply involved.

But he had to admit it.

Su Zhenxing put himself in her shoes. Back in Yanjiang, any girl, after misunderstanding someone, would be deeply moved when that person risked their life to save her.

He figured they'd all fall for him.

But on the other hand, Su Zhenxing didn't object to normal friendships, but if Su Tong became a simp, his mental state would crumble.

The key was, Su Tong was definitely on the verge of developing that tendency.

His only daughter, Su Zhenxing, was going to become a simp?

"Daughter, the day I saved you, do you know who those two girls were with Xiao Jiang?" Su Zhenxing asked cautiously.

Su Tong shook her head.

"One was his sister," Su Zhenxing said.

But the other, Su Zhenxing didn't say, but his subconscious was already quite obvious.

Su Tong, whether she understood or pretended not to hear, said regretfully, "Oh dear, it was his sister! Oh no, why didn't I get her contact information?"

Pfft!!!

Meanwhile.

Just as Su Zhenxing's mental state was crumbling.

Yunhai, a village about ten miles away from a prestigious high school.

The village seemed destined for demolition; even the narrow alleyways were topped with rooftops.

The winding paths were numerous and labyrinthine.

Everywhere you looked, there were multi-story buildings.

In a small, secluded room within a dark courtyard, two young girls were engrossed in their studies.

“Jiang Ning, can’t you relax for a bit? I’m so tired!”

One of the girls rubbed her hands vigorously, her brow furrowed with worry as she looked at her homework.

That’s what senior year of high school is like—endless homework, endless practice problems.

If you want to relax, you can relax anytime, but without a doubt, if you want to have dreams, your homework will be endless.

The only thing on your mind when you open your eyes is studying.

“Guo Na, keep working hard, don’t forget our goal.” Jiang Ning looked up, her eyes filled with determination.

Seemingly inspired by Jiang Ning, the girl called Guo Na’s weariness vanished instantly.

Guo Na couldn't bear the studying for more than three minutes. She stood up, wandering around looking at everything.

Finally, bored out of her mind, she sat down at the table, resting her chin on her hand and watching Jiang Ning.

"I really admire you. Except for washing up and sleeping, I've never seen your eyes leave your books," Guo Na said with admiration.

Jiang Ning, upon hearing this, lowered his gaze for a moment, then refocused his eyes on the countless test papers and assignments.

Break.

There will be plenty of time to rest later.

But definitely not now.

Jiang Ning, head down, scribbled her homework under the lamplight.

The environment was damp.

The room was moldy.

The light was dim; the room rarely saw sunlight.

But this was Jiang Ning's life now.

A life she had grown accustomed to.

She wanted to change herself, to change her father's fate.

She understood this even more clearly.

No one could be relied upon except herself.



Chapter 341 Kidnapping, Abduction, Falling from the Sky, Seeking Death


Guo Na was just Jiang Ning's good friend, a very close friend. She had inadvertently discovered Jiang Ning's address, and because Jiang Ning's father was often away working, Jiang Ning spent most of her time in that room.

Although Guo Na felt sorry for her, she didn't show it. But from then on, whenever she had a holiday or free time, she would come to keep Jiang Ning company.

Jiang Ning's expression softened. No one knew that over two years ago, when she accompanied her father to her second uncle's house, she stood at the bottom of the stairs, not even having a chance to enter the door, when all of her father's gifts were thrown out.

Since then, she had studied desperately, hoping to one day change her fate.

"By the way, don't you have any relatives, uncles, or aunts? You should at least rent a place nearby," Guo Na asked.

"No relatives," Jiang Ning replied without looking up.

Guo Na nodded thoughtfully.

*Thump thump thump!!*

Just then, a knock sounded at the door.

Jiang Ning stood up, intending to open the door.

“Is Uncle off work?” Guo Na stopped her and asked.

“It should be my dad; it’s about time he gets off work,” Jiang Ning explained.

“You should still ask,” Guo Na said.

Because, when it comes to security, the more glamorous the surface, the more terrifying the darkness.

In 2003, Yunhai was still such a chaotic village; the dangers within were unimaginable.

Jiang Ning, a young girl, always kept the door locked when she was home.

“Who is it?” Jiang Ning had already guessed, and instead of opening the door immediately, she asked.

The next moment…

Knock knock knock!!!

An even more intense knocking sounded.

There was no answer.

Jiang Ning and Guo Na both paled.

“Hold the door shut,” Guo Na stepped forward.

But before they could react…

Boom!!!

The next moment.

The single wooden door was kicked open instantly.

Three masked men appeared.

They seemed hesitant upon seeing the two women inside.

“Never mind, kill them both,” the leader said directly.

The other two didn't hesitate, instantly drawing knives and rushing in.

“If you don't want to die, come with us.” A dagger was pressed against the two women's necks.

Jiang Ning and Guo Na were just two young girls, no match for three men, especially since they were armed.

“No, kill us!” Jiang Ning cried out in terror.

But unfortunately, the three men didn't waste any words, grabbing Guo Na and Jiang Ning and shoving them into the van parked outside.

Killing requires skill, and even more so, the location.

These men were very particular.

Murder at the scene is the most rudimentary method. Even if the body were taken away, the blood-soaked ground would be impossible to clean up, so they planned to take it to a secluded place.

What would happen to the two women there was unknown.

The van was spacious.

After getting into the van,

almost without giving the two women time to react, their mouths were taped shut and their bodies bound.

They could only stare in terror at the vehicle.

Besides the three men, there was a driver.

In the back seat, in the passenger seat, was another man.

"Let's go," the man in the passenger seat said curtly.

The entire operation was professional, not amateurish.

From start to finish, the kidnapping took less than half a minute.

The door opened and closed, the light flickered, and books rustled in the breeze.

The two girls' recently completed homework flipped through the pages in the wind, but the room was empty.

In the pitch-black night, no one was disturbed.

Or rather,

In the complex and chaotic environment, no one around had reacted.

"First, stop the bleeding of the shot. Continue interrogating the minor injuries. If all else fails, use the Great Memory Restoration Technique. There's no need to hold back with these vicious criminals." In the darkness, Jiang Tian drove a Volkswagen Santana.

It wasn't that Jiang Tian didn't want a Phaeton, but Zhao Wei had borrowed it.

Of course, it wasn't Zhao Wei driving; he had another task. It was Zhao Qiuni who seemed to be picking up some friends, so Jiang Tian gave him the car.

He himself drove a regular Volkswagen Santana.

Very discreet.

Of course, Jiang Tian had an excellent memory.

Although there was no GPS now, Jiang Tian remembered how to get to the place his third uncle had mentioned, and he hadn't made any mistakes along the way.

After exiting a main road and driving for about half a minute, it was still pitch black.

Jiang Tian's eyes narrowed.

Because Jiang Tian knew that the prestigious No. 3 Middle School was undergoing dormitory renovations, so about two graduating classes of high school students wouldn't be able to live on campus.

That meant that every night after school, around 9 or 10 pm, they had to walk this stretch of road in the dark. No wonder his third uncle insisted on accompanying them to school, no matter how difficult it was.

Thinking of this, Jiang Tian couldn't help but slap himself twice.

The person he was before his rebirth truly deserved to die!

Even though he treated her that way, Jiang Tian remembered that she was one of the few people he hadn't kicked them out. He even arranged a meeting for Jiang Peng with that professor who had transferred to the system.

Even though she ultimately didn't help much.

But Jiang Ning did help them in the end.

Thinking about this, Jiang Tian wanted to slap himself even more.

Fortunately, there's still room for maneuver.

"What about Jiang Zihao?"

Zhao Wei asked hesitantly over the phone.

The Great Memory Restoration Technique is manageable with others, but Jiang Zihao seems to be Jiang Tian's cousin. How can he get him to do it?

"No matter who it is, if they break the law, even if it's my cousin, or even my own father, I'll use the Great Memory Restoration Technique when necessary to solve the case," Jiang Tian declared righteously.

*Hiss!!!*

Zhao Wei, on the other end of the phone, swallowed hard, feeling a surge of adrenaline coursing through his veins.

This was their boss.

"Boss, don't worry, we definitely won't let you down," Zhao Wei said, his voice trembling with excitement.

This bastard was about to kill him.

If Jiang Tian isn't taught a lesson, he might go astray.

"Sometimes, I'm still too kind."

Jiang Tian put down his phone, unable to help but sigh with a touch of self-pity.

Immediately afterward, a van appeared in the opposite direction through the halogen headlights.

They passed each other.

"Alright, I have to go, I'm hanging up." Jiang Tian hung up the phone.

His gaze suddenly shifted to the van whose taillights were on as it drove away.

Closed windows.

The headlights had just shone on it, and although he hadn't been able to see inside the oncoming vehicle, something about that large van—especially in the dark—was very suspicious.

Instinctively, Jiang Tian glanced at it with his radar scanner.

Just one glance.

At least four or five points of light, densely packed together, gradually moving.

Jiang Tian's gaze sharpened for a moment. Then, as if struck by a sudden realization, he floored the accelerator, swerved sharply, pulled the handbrake, and almost performed a drift U-turn on the spot, flooring the gas pedal once more.

The Santana roared like a sports car, its engine exploding wildly in the darkness.



Chapter 342 Which gang are you from? I'll kill you.


"Ughhhhhh!!!"

A series of muffled whimpers echoed from inside the van, but unfortunately, both women were gagged and could only make faint sounds through their noses.

They struggled frantically when they saw the Volkswagen Santana.

Because they had just overheard the conversation, their terror intensified.

*Slap!!!*

Just then, a man in black slapped Guo Na across the face, a sinister smile spreading across his face. "If you dare to struggle again, I'll slit your throat first."

As he spoke, a dagger was already pressed against the young girl's pale neck.

This filled Guo Na with even greater terror.

Jiang Ning, too, felt a pang of fear. Few could remain calm in such a situation.

Although Jiang Ning was precocious, he had long known that he would change his fate through education.

However, they had overheard their conversation.

These people were going to kill them.

“Boss, these two little wench are pretty good-looking,” one of the men in black said with a lewd grin.

The man in the passenger seat had remained silent throughout, except for instructing the driver at the beginning, after which he maintained a calm demeanor.

Only when the people in the back spoke did the man in the passenger seat finally say, “Don’t worry, you’ll have your fun when we get there. They said they’re taking pictures of them.”

A sinister smile crept across his face as he spoke.

The people in the back seemed to understand instantly.

The car fell silent. Even though Guo Na and the others knew that continuing meant certain death, they were powerless. They were surrounded by burly men in black.

And they were just two frail young girls; how could they possibly withstand these men?

Even if there were only two men in black, let alone so many, they wouldn't be able to handle them.

The more she thought about it...

The despair in their eyes deepened.

Jiang Ning glanced at Guo Na with deep regret. When they burst in, the men in black had clearly targeted her; Guo Na had only been caught in the crossfire.

If it weren't for her...

But why?

That's why Jiang Ning would achieve such success in the future. And why, among so many people, would that old professor, less influential than those in politics, take Jiang Ning as his last disciple? It was because Jiang Ning remained remarkably calm in the face of adversity.

Similarly, he was extremely intelligent.

He had already realized that Guo Na was implicated because of him.

But why did these people want to kill him?

Especially after they spoke again.

Jiang Ning was utterly shocked.

Not only did they want to kill them, but they also wanted to humiliate them and take photos.

And there were powerful figures behind it?

What did they want these photos for? It was undoubtedly to deal a heavy blow to those close to her.

Her father?

No.

His father was just an honest, simple man; he couldn't possibly have offended such a terrifying figure.

Who was that?

His eldest uncle?

His third uncle?

Jiang Ning's fists were drenched in sweat.

Flames burned in his eyes.

Because her family had never received any favors from her uncles, yet they were ultimately implicated by them.

Jiang Ning understood the crux of the matter, but what good did it do? Would these people listen to her explanation? Would they care?

How could they?

These vicious, utterly depraved people, even if they knew, wouldn't let them go.

A bitter smile appeared on Jiang Ning's face.

Whatever the truth was, it was no longer something she could change.

And just then...

Boom boom boom!!!

A sudden, intense roar erupted.

It wasn't the sound of a sports car.

It was simply a malfunction in the Santana's exhaust pipe; it had broken in the middle, causing a leak. Under the high engine power, the leaking exhaust pipe produced a sound like a tractor flooring its accelerator.

Jiang Ning, bound tightly, leaned against Guo Na, the two silent.

And as the roaring sound...

The minivan had left the country road and entered the main road.

The driver sped along, moving at a high speed.

But while he was fast, Jiang Tian was even faster.

In the pitch-black night, halogen headlights suddenly appeared behind the minivan, their high beams illuminating the vehicle.

"Damn it, those high beam bastards!" the driver cursed, his words reflected in the rearview mirror.

"Drive carefully, don't mess up the mission," the leader in the passenger seat said calmly.

The driver knew there were two people strapped to the vehicle, so he remained silent, choosing to swallow his anger.

But then, in the next instant.

A buzzing horn sounded, and the Volkswagen Santana that had been shining its lights at them was already beside their vehicle.

The next instant, the Santana, half a car's width behind, instantly rammed into the minivan's side rear.

Anyone who's been in a car accident knows that a rear-end collision with a car on the side can cause the vehicle in front to lose control instantly, even with the slightest bump.

That's exactly what happened to the minivan.

The minivan crashed into the guardrail instantly.

Luckily, it wasn't going fast, only around 60 km/h.

Even so, thanks to the guardrail's cushioning, the people inside were still dazed and disoriented.

The driver was furious: "Damn it, you idiot, how do you drive?"

They were still on duty; if a traffic cop showed up, they'd be done for!

But then, a moment later, someone got out of the minivan that hit them and gave them the middle finger.

Vroom!!!

This guy couldn't stand it.

The driver was the first to explode in anger, kicking open the car door.

The passenger, the boss, also got out, his face grim and radiating anger.

He was determined to teach this guy a lesson he'd never forget.

At least beat them up before they run.

The two men's faces were grim.

Especially the leader, who had just stepped out of the passenger door and onto the ground.

Bang!!!

A deafening gunshot rang out.

The gunshot was deafening, almost within reach.

When the leader looked over, he saw the driver lying in a pool of blood with a thud.

[Sin Value +1800]

Jiang Tian nodded in satisfaction, blowing away the smoke from the gun barrel.

Then his gaze fell on the man who had gotten out of the passenger seat.

[Zhan Bai, a professional thug for the Wenye criminal gang, with a crime value of 2800, has committed numerous heinous crimes in Yunnan Province for many years, creating countless egregious cases. Latest intelligence: just ten minutes ago, he kidnapped two innocent girls.]

Jiang Tian's eyes gradually turned cold.

The van appeared at his third uncle's residence, and these people had just committed a crime—a kidnapping.

Jiang Tian didn't need to say more about what had happened.

"Friend, which gang are you from?" The leader, who got out of the passenger seat, had icy eyes, showing no sign of losing his composure despite his underling's death.

At the same time, he had already reached out and stealthily touched the glove compartment, because his pistol was inside.

Bang!!!



Chapter 343 Jiang Ning's感动 (moved/touched) – Was it because of family?


The next moment.

A deafening roar resounded.

The gang leader, who had been touching his gun, felt a sharp pain in his arm.

He looked at Jiang Tian in terror.

“What? You kidnapped my relative and you're asking who I am?”

As he spoke, Jiang Tian slowly walked to the front of the van, and his face finally emerged completely from the darkness.

BOOM!!!

The instant Jiang Tian's face appeared.

The gang leader, shot, completely lost his composure.

Jiang Ning, inside the van, stared blankly at that face.

She recognized it.

How could she not?

Back then, it was him, it was Jiang Tian, ​​who threw out all the gifts their family had sent to Jiang Tian's house.

Even her father hadn't even entered the door before this man had condescendingly mocked them, asking what kind of relationship a poor relative was trying to establish.

Of course.

Actually, Jiang Tian's actions back then were influenced by his uncle, Jiang Yong.

Jiang Tian's family had helped his uncle multiple times, but Jiang Yong's actions and behavior disgusted Jiang Tian, ​​leading him to treat all his poor relatives with contempt.

He felt no goodwill towards them whatsoever.

However, having been reborn and gained a deeper understanding of human nature, Jiang Tian finally understood.

This cousin was truly good, and his third uncle was quite nice too.

In his past life, he had treated his third uncle's family so badly, yet when his father came to visit, his third uncle had been busy running around, even taking him to Jiang Ning to ask for help.

Jiang Tian was a grateful person.

He had been immature in his past life, so now he should make amends to this cousin.

But right now, Jiang Ning was clearly unaware of what had happened.

Jiang Tian stood before her.

He held a pistol.

Shot after shot, the booming sounds of gunfire seeming to terrify Jiang Ning.

And at this moment.

Besides the two men in black who got out of the car, there were three more in black inside.

Seeing Jiang Tian fire his gun, they instantly panicked.

“Stop! If you don’t stop, both of them in the car will be killed!” The leader, who had gotten out of the car, managed to remain calm.

It was clear he was a professional thug from a criminal organization.

He was clearly a professional; even in this situation, he knew what to do.

Before he finished speaking, the three men in black inside the car reacted, some drawing guns, others pulling out daggers, attempting to threaten and coerce the two women in the car.

“Jiang Tian, ​​although I don’t know why you’re here, and I know your skills, your cousin, Jiang Ning, is in our hands, along with another girl. Put down your weapons, or they will both die. We might die, but your cousin will definitely not survive.” Clearly, this leader had seen Jiang Tian’s file.

Jiang Tian wasn’t surprised.

The Wenye Group, this criminal organization, is completely different from ordinary criminal organizations.

Right now, Jiang Tian's identity is practically on the verge of being completely exposed.

Even without the riddled-with-holes Municipal Police Bureau, the outside world would generally know Jiang Tian's identity as a Sixth-Rank King.

Moreover, there's no guarantee that there won't be corruption within the police system itself.

"No, you will die, but they won't," Jiang Tian shook his head.

"What does this mean?" The leader's mind had barely formed a thought.

The next moment.

Bang bang bang!!!

Jiang Tian showed no mercy this time.

To Jiang Tian, ​​their information was worthless.

Because they were all from today's kidnapping incidents.

And as for the survivors, keeping just one was enough.

Of course, these people weren't of much value to Jiang Tian either. For a criminal organization like that, getting them to talk was incredibly difficult.

If they didn't talk, they might survive.

If they did talk, they'd only face death.

Actually, the most difficult interrogations weren't in criminal investigations, but rather in drug enforcement.

The criminal investigation team mostly dealt with impulsive assaults or murders, mostly involving ordinary people with low tolerance for stress; a little interrogation was usually enough for them to confess.

But the drug enforcement system was different.

These people understood that once they confessed, it was all over.

Even with a powerful memory recovery technique, these people would stubbornly persist, refusing to turn back until they hit a brick wall.

Bang! Bang! Bang!

Three shots rang out in quick succession.

Bound Jiang Ning only saw Jiang Tian pointing a gun at the car.

The next moment, three gunshots rang out; Jiang Ning even clearly felt bullets whizz past her ears.

The next moment, the dagger pressed against her neck was gone.

When she turned her head,

in the dim light,

the three men in black who had been sitting in the back seat were lying together, all with gunshot wounds to the center of their foreheads.

Dead.

The first time she had ever seen dead people.

Jiang Ning's pupils contracted rapidly.

A wave of nausea and vomiting surged up.

But at this moment...

Jiang Ning forcibly suppressed her discomfort and turned to look at the car.

Her cousin, whom she considered a terrible student and a disgrace to her,

had no expression on his face.

It was as if he hadn't killed these people at all.

Was this really her cousin?

Jiang Ning's eyes were filled with confusion.

What left her mind completely blank was how he had done it?

Even in the dim light inside the car, how did Jiang Tian manage to easily get headshots from outside?

But Jiang Tian didn't think about that.

He approached the leader.

Three pleasant system voices rang in his ears.

Several thousand sin points had been credited to his account.

Jiang Tian's lips curled into a smile.

Actually, while Jiang Tian's sin points seemed plentiful, they couldn't withstand much consumption. For Jiang Tian, ​​every single sin point was priceless.

Even a basic keyword has almost become a professional one.

Before, there were over 200,000, but after getting the gold keyword "God of the Ocean," there are now only over 100,000.

Several thousand is no small amount.

"Before the operation, I knew you were an unerring marksman, that you'd shot hundreds of drug dealers under your command. I never believed it, but now I've finally seen it."

This boss was also a lone wolf; the passenger door was open, allowing him to see clearly inside the van.

The last three underlings were all shot dead.

They couldn't even react.

Jiang Tian was terrifying.

"Next, it'll be your Wenye Group's turn." Jiang Tian walked up to the boss, squatted down, and said expressionlessly.

"What Wenye Group? I don't know anything about it." Zhan Bai shook his head.

"Whether you admit it or not is irrelevant, you old bastard. You dare kidnap my family? Don't worry, you'll be treated well inside." Jiang Tian's eyes flashed with malice.

Zhan Bai, sitting on the ground, instinctively shuddered.

Then, his face filled with terror as he looked at Jiang Tian.

Jiang Ning, in the car, heard Jiang Tian's words.

But his whole body trembled instantly.

Jiang Tian's unintentional remark left Jiang Ning completely shaken.

He even looked at Jiang Tian in disbelief.

Family?

Kidnapping a family member?

So, I'm his family?



Chapter 344 Guo Na is dumbfounded, Your Second Brother is pretty awesome


Jiang Ning bit her lip.

If they were family, why before?

Jiang Ning remembered when she was little, in the village, whenever someone bullied her, Jiang Tian would always stand up for her.

Back then, Jiang Ning longed to be close to Jiang Tian, ​​to be near him, to play with him.

But then Jiang Tian would ruthlessly drive her away.

More than two years ago.

Jiang Ning, who never asked for favors and never let her father ask for favors, heard about her second uncle and thought of Jiang Tian. She agreed to her father's request to come and ask for help.

But what she faced was Jiang Tian's second act of humiliation.

And now?

Is this the third time?

Jiang Ning's gaze was somewhat lost.

Just then.

Boom!!!

In the brief moment Jiang Ning was stunned, Jiang Tian had already grabbed Zhan Bai's head and slammed it hard against the car hood, instantly creating a dent.

As for Zhan Bai, the ringleader...

His head was swollen and red, his eyes glazed over.

“You think you can touch my family, but I can't touch yours?”

*Boom!!!*

Jiang Tian's voice rang out as Zhan Bai's head slammed against the hatch again.

Blood streamed down Zhan Bai's forehead.

Inside the vehicle, Jiang Ning was shaken once more.

Family?

He said family?

A flicker of life returned to her dead heart.

But Jiang Ning couldn't believe it.

Because of the two previous lessons, she no longer dared to trust Jiang Tian's attempts at reconciliation.

*Boom!!!*

Another sound rang out.

Jiang Ning grabbed the back of Zhan Bai's head and slammed it violently against the hatch again.

Blood splattered.

Jiang Tian released his grip, and Zhan Bai lay limp on the ground like a corpse.

Jiang Tian took out handcuffs and cuffed Zhan Bai's hands.

Then, he turned his gaze to the car.

"Are you alright?"

Jiang Tian opened the back door.

"Waaah!!!" Guo Na shook her head, tears welling in her eyes.

Jiang Tian glanced at her and breathed a sigh of relief. The two girls were alright. Jiang Tian didn't say anything, and tore off the duct tape binding them.

"Waaah, thank you, thank you for saving us, waaah." Guo Na was already sobbing uncontrollably.

"Contact your family. We'll go back to the city police station together to give a statement later," Jiang Tian said.

Guo Na then remembered and nodded gratefully, "My dad, my dad's a policeman too."

"What's your name?" Jiang Tian raised an eyebrow.

"I, I'm called Guo Na," Guo Na said.

Jiang Tian paused slightly upon hearing the name, thinking to himself, "Could it be such a coincidence?"

But...

Captain Guo was Jiang Tian's former superior, and they had known each other for a long time. Jiang Tian had even heard Captain Guo mention that his daughter was a senior in high school and about to take the college entrance exam.

Hiss!!!

It seems that's true.

"I left my phone at home," Guo Na said softly.

At the same time, her eyes were secretly glancing at Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian, ​​however, immediately called Captain Guo.

After all, the case involved Captain Guo, so it was appropriate to have him come over.

After hanging up, Jiang Tian looked at Jiang Ning.

Jiang Ning hadn't said a word the entire time, keeping his head down in silence.

"What, you don't even call me 'brother' when we meet?" Jiang Tian asked.

Guo Na's eyes widened.

Before she could even utter the word "brother," Jiang Ning's soft voice came from beside her.

"Second Brother."

A moment of silence.

Guo Na finally called out.

That's right.

According to the three cousins, Zihao was the eldest, and Jiang Tian wasn't the second.

"Second Brother?"

Guo Na was dumbfounded.

She glanced blankly at Jiang Tian, ​​then at Jiang Ning.

"You're Xiao Ning's friend, right? Just call me Second Brother, we're cousins." Jiang Tian breathed a sigh of relief seeing the two were alright, then extended an invitation.

"Didn't you say you had no relatives?" Guo Na exclaimed.

Jiang Ning, already silent, darkened instantly upon hearing Guo Na's voice.

Jiang Tian, ​​however,

sighed deeply upon hearing Guo Na's words.

His past self had indeed been a fool.

“Jiang Ning, you have such a powerful brother, why didn’t you say so sooner?” Guo Na continued.

Looking at Jiang Tian, ​​she felt as if she were seeing light.

He descended from the sky.

Corpses lay scattered on the car.

Corpses lay on the ground.

And a half-dead person.

It has to be said.

The killing was incredibly satisfying.

So satisfying that it scared Guo Na to death.

When had such a young girl ever witnessed such a horrific scene?

“Xiao Ning, the problem this time is my fault. I’ve been arresting a lot of criminals recently, and I’ve encountered retaliation from them,” Jiang Tian sighed.

“Where’s my dad?” Jiang Ning asked immediately.

“At the city police station,” Jiang Tian explained, then recounted the whole story.

Jiang Ning was struck dumb, her face turning pale.

“Xiao Ning, your third uncle is alright. He’ll probably be released after the case is closed,” Jiang Tian didn’t know how to comfort her.

"I understand."

Unexpectedly, Jiang Ning didn't make a fuss, which surprised Jiang Tian.

And soon...

Captain Guo arrived quickly.

Although it wasn't far from the city police station, it was only about a ten-minute drive.

When Captain Guo arrived, he saw the corpses scattered on the ground and an unconscious person.

He quickly glanced over them and immediately spotted his daughter.

"Dad!"

Guo Na rushed towards Captain Guo.

Captain Guo was also filled with lingering fear.

So close, so very close.

"Xiao Jiang, thank goodness you arrived in time, otherwise the consequences would have been unimaginable." Captain Guo instructed his men to handle the aftermath, then found Jiang Tian, ​​his face full of lingering fear.

"This is my fault, Guo Na was also implicated." Jiang Tian said apologetically.

Captain Guo grinned, patted Jiang Tian on the shoulder, and said, "In our line of work, it's a gamble, we might not live to see tomorrow. This isn't the first time we've dealt with retaliation against family members. We're mentally prepared. If we were really afraid, we wouldn't be doing this."

That's what he said.

But Captain Guo recalled the hardships he endured as a narcotics officer, never daring to reveal them to the public. Even when on duty, seeing his daughter, he had to instruct her to pretend she didn't know him. The bitterness he felt couldn't be expressed in a few words.

You'll never know the dangers and hardships of this profession until you've been in it.

Jiang Tian's gaze also darkened slightly, feeling a heavy weight on his chest.

The aftermath and handling of the situation wouldn't require Jiang Tian's involvement.

However, necessary statements still needed to be taken.

Jiang Tian followed Captain Guo's car directly back to the Municipal Public Security Bureau, along with Guo Na and Jiang Ning.

Back at the bureau, it was brightly lit.

Captain Guo led Guo Na inside first, followed closely by Jiang Tian and Jiang Ning.

"Can I...can I see my dad?" Jiang Ning asked softly.

"Sure, I'll take you after I finish taking your statement," Jiang Tian nodded.

Jiang Ning hesitated for a moment, then said, "Thank you, Second Brother."

A slight smile played on Jiang Tian's lips.

How wonderful!

Mistakes and regrets were being made up for little by little.

Everything was gradually improving.

"Team Leader!"

"The team leader is back."

"The team leader has done another good deed."

"I'm so envious!"

Along the way, in Jiang Ning's eyes, every passing officer greeted Jiang Tian with respect.

This completely shocked and bewildered Jiang Ning.

Team Leader?

Jiang Tianna doesn't seem to be a senior this year; he should still have almost half a semester left to graduate, right?



Chapter 345 If you can't kill him, then beat him to death.


Jiang Ning bit her lip, watching Jiang Tian lead the way.

The surrounding police officers greeted Jiang Tian with almost universally broad smiles.

"Sister Yu Hui."

Jiang Tian simply waved his hand.

Because of tonight's operation, the backlog of cases requiring review, and even the interrogation of those arrested overseas, the city police had been working overtime.

Yu Hui's eyes were already dark-circled from lack of sleep. She rubbed her eyes, took a sip of coffee, and stood up when she saw Jiang Tian arrive.

As a clerk, Yu Hui had been truly miserable lately. She had never had such a heavy workload before, but on the other hand, their busy schedule also meant that the social environment was improving.

Thinking of this, Yu Hui felt a surge of energy back at work.

"Team Leader Jiang, what are your orders?" Yu Hui asked, her voice drawn out and strained.

Seeing Jiang Tian, ​​she instinctively sensed the terrifying workload.

Jiang Tian could easily see Yu Hui's feelings, but he was also helpless in this regard.

He couldn't just leave those drug dealers or criminals unattended.

"This is my cousin. Take her to see my third uncle. Oh, and that's Jiang Hao," Jiang Tian instructed directly.

Having arrived at the Municipal Bureau, Jiang Tian also wanted to check on the progress of the interrogation.

Yu Hui visibly relaxed: "Leave it to me."

"Thank you for your trouble, Sister Yu Hui," Jiang Tian said with a smile.

"I just hope you can be a little slower next time you arrest someone. Did you see the files on my desk?" Yu Hui pointed to the table.

Jiang Tian certainly hadn't missed them.

The stack of files on the table was even taller than Yu Hui herself.

"Xiao Ning, you go directly with Sister Yu Hui," Jiang Tian said to Jiang Ning.

"Okay," Jiang Ning nodded almost imperceptibly.

Mainly, Jiang Ning was still somewhat dazed.

His cousin seemed to have become an official?

Especially, the respectful looks others gave him were unmistakable.

But how could this be?

Jiang Ning's head was still spinning.

However, Jiang Tian didn't say much and turned to find Zhao Wei.

"Boss." Zhao Wei was in the interrogation room.

When Jiang Tian entered, Wen Lang was being interrogated.

At this moment, Wen Lang wasn't sitting; he was chained to a radiator pipe, unable to sit or stand, forced into a horse stance.

His legs were visibly trembling uncontrollably.

Jiang Tian's face was cold.

He deserved it.

"Did he confess?" Jiang Tian asked.

"He didn't say anything." Zhao Wei shook his head.

Jiang Tian frowned slightly; clearly, the force wasn't enough.

When Jiang Tian made his move, he deliberately held back, sparing Wen Lang's strength. While the attack appeared ruthless at the time, he had avoided all vital organs.

Jiang Tian: "Increase the force."

Zhao Wei hesitated. "He's from Wenye Group. Is what we're doing appropriate?"

"What are you afraid of? If anything goes wrong, I'll take the blame. Interrogate him to death." Jiang Tian said expressionlessly.

Hiss!!!

Seeing Jiang Tian's expression, Zhao Wei instantly knew that Jiang Tian was enraged.

"I understand, boss." Zhao Wei understood immediately and led his men to get Jiajia the meal.

"You bastard, you beast, I'm going to kill you!"

Wen Lang's eyes were red. This pampered young master, spoiled since childhood, had never suffered like this.

He'd never endured such humiliation.

No matter where he was, Wen Lang was always impeccably polite, but Jiang Tian's slap brought him back to reality.

"Don't wait until I get out, I'll wipe out your whole family!" Wen Lang was nearly driven mad by the torment.

Nothing could be more agonizing than this.

But Jiang Tian slowly approached, grabbed Wen Lang's hair, and sneered.

*Slap!!!*

The next moment, Jiang Tian slapped him across the face: "Kill me? You'll never have another chance in this life. Also, the men you sent to capture my cousin have all been killed by me. The one who led them, Zhan Bai, has also been captured and is already confessing. You still want to get out? In your next life."

Wen Lang's pupils contracted.

Even though he'd been beaten,

it wasn't as important as his subordinate being caught, especially if he confessed.

Because he understood that once the charges were proven, he would definitely die.

Trying to trick me?

Yes, this bastard was trying to trick me.

Wen Lang sneered, "Don't try to fool me. What Zhan Bai? I don't know him at all. I'm suing you, kid. You know nothing about Wenye Group. My dad got the news and will be here soon. You're dead."

Jiang Tian looked at Wen Lang's arrogant demeanor, sighed, and shook his head. He could understand.

It was just like in the beginning, when those guys from Yunda openly tried to bribe him.

Blatantly.

That reflected how arrogant criminals were in Yunhai, or even Yun Province as a whole.

"Times have changed."

Jiang Tian patted Wen Lang's face and smiled indifferently.

These people were completely unaware of the overall situation in Yunhai.

Yunhai had changed.

No, Yun Province had changed.

These people had no idea that the moment they attacked Elder Mu, the winds of change in Yunhai had shifted.

The so-called concerns and influence?

They no longer existed.

Now, even if Jiang Tian stirred up a storm, it was exactly what the higher-ups wanted to see, or rather, even without Elder Mu's incident.

The higher-ups didn't want to see Yunhai stagnant.

Wen Lang thought that Yunhai was still the same as before; that would be suicidal.

"Boss, Chief Gao wants to see you."

Just then, the interrogation room door opened, and Li Zijin poked her head in, calling out to Jiang Tian.

"Chief Gao is still here?" Jiang Tian asked, surprised.

However, before leaving, Jiang Tian instructed Zhao Wei not to hold back and to use excessive force. This made Zhao Wei eager and excited.

“Boss, this beast has been cursing non-stop ever since he came in. Now I can really go all out,” Zhao Wei said excitedly.

“Don’t hold back. As long as he doesn’t confess, we’re not afraid to kill him.”

Jiang Tian glanced at Wen Lang, then turned and left.

This was no joke.

Now that Jiang Tian possessed the Eye of Judgment, these people would either confess or not; at most, it would just require some effort from Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian could easily find the necessary evidence from the latest intelligence reports.

“Jiang Tian, ​​you son of a bitch, I’m going to kill your whole family! As soon as I get out, you bastards, I’ll wipe your entire family out!” Wen Lang’s eyes were bloodshot.

When Jiang Tian walked out the door, only a few people remained, saying things like, “Don’t come any closer.”

Jiang Tian closed the interrogation room door.

Li Zijin said worriedly, “Boss, Chief Gao has been here at the Municipal Bureau. He’s been working overtime here lately. He was watching the interrogation just now.”

Jiang Tian hesitated for a moment, then nodded. “So what if he saw it?”

“Also, besides Chief Gao, there were other people.” Li Zijin hesitated.

“What’s wrong today?” Jiang Tian sensed something was wrong.

“People from Wenye Group are here,” Li Zijin reminded him.



Chapter 346 The Evil Behind the Mask, the Big Boss is Relieved, Good Comrade


Jiang Tian suddenly realized: "Don't worry, stand up straight. We're the police, those people are bandits. Times have changed. Yunhai isn't afraid of chaos, understand?"

Jiang Tian had keenly sensed that the higher-ups were seeking change.

Why had he been promoted so quickly and without regard to precedent?

Jiang Tian had previously thought it was due to his merits, but now he sensed something was amiss.

Perhaps the higher-ups were seeking change, to completely disrupt the stagnant Yunhai.

When Jiang Tian arrived,

besides Gao Xiaolong's secretary, there was another unfamiliar person in a suit, also appearing to be a secretary, standing guard at the office door.

"Comrade Jiang has arrived," Gao Xiaolong's secretary said familiarly, shaking hands with Jiang Tian.

"Secretary Fang," Jiang Tian shook hands.

"Chief Gao has been waiting for you. This is the secretary from Huai Province, surnamed Sun," Secretary Fang said, pointing to another secretary.

But these words caused Jiang Tian's expression to change slightly.

Huai Province?

Jiang Tian recalled a few days ago in Yanjiang when he arrived with Su Zhenxing. Back then, Su Zhenxing had offered Jiang Tian a few words of encouragement, but those were just polite platitudes, and Jiang Tian hadn't taken them to heart.

Sometimes, Jiang Tian only half-listened to the words of these high-ranking officials; taking them seriously meant losing.

But now, Huai Sheng had actually come in person.

Why?

Wenye Group?

Or simply to take a look?

Jiang Tian's eyes darkened. He wasn't familiar with Huai Sheng, and if Huai Sheng got involved, it might not be a good thing for Jiang Tian.

"Secretary Sun," Jiang Tian said, his face expressionless.

"Officer Jiang, I've heard so much about you. This is my business card. Let's have dinner together sometime." Secretary Sun was very enthusiastic, seemingly adept at social maneuvering.

No.

She should be called a leader.

Jiang Tian narrowed his eyes.

A secretary working for Huai Sheng—this was no ordinary secretary.

Even those people who came down from their positions were at the leadership level, let alone officials of the seventh rank before the prime minister. Jiang Tian, ​​while not exactly a master of social maneuvering, had been tempered by his two lifetimes, making him not much different from these people within the system.

"Secretary Sun, if you have time, I'll definitely treat you to dinner," Jiang Tian said, accepting the business card.

These seemingly insignificant matters were, in fact, ways for Jiang Tian to gradually build his network of connections.

They might come in useful someday.

These socially adept secretaries were eager to befriend him.

Knock knock knock!!

Soon, Secretary Sun knocked on the door. After hearing a sound from inside, she hurriedly went in to report, "Comrade Jiang is here."

"Let him in quickly."

Provincial Governor Huai's voice continued.

Jiang Tian didn't think much of it.

As the head of a province, this kind of air was perfectly normal.

It was this office that belonged to Chief Gao.

That's why, since it's inconvenient for Chief Gao to come here for inspections, a large office was set up on the top floor early on, complete with a bed.

If he gets tired from working, he can rest directly in the office; this office belongs to Chief Gao.

Upon entering,

Jiang Tian saw Chief Gao and Huai Sheng sitting on the sofa, both smoking and looking relaxed.

Of course, most importantly, on the separate sofa opposite them sat a middle-aged man, around forty or fifty years old, wearing gold-rimmed glasses, sitting upright.

Jiang Tian instinctively activated his Eye of Judgment.

[Wen Jijiang, Sin Value 12571. Recent intelligence: Using the power of the Wenye Group, he provided protection for drug trafficking forces, producing and selling large quantities of heroin. The other day, he used his subordinate transport convoy to transport heroin on a large scale, reaping huge profits.]

Hiss!!!

He glanced at it.

Jiang Tian was shocked. Over ten thousand! Over ten thousand! What a heinous crime!

The Eye of Judgment is a special entry.

However, for Jiang Tian, ​​it was more terrifying than any other entry, because for any criminal, anyone with a sin value exceeding one thousand,

the Eye of Judgment could directly provide recent crime intelligence. This intelligence contained evidence and clues; in other words, with just one glance, Jiang Tian could essentially convict them.

Seeing this, Jiang Tian sneered inwardly, but remained outwardly calm.

There were outsiders present. In truth, if it were simply a matter between Jiang Tian and Chief Gao, he wouldn't need a formality to enter this office. If he was in a bad mood, he could simply kick the door open and barge in.

It's just that there were outsiders.

Besides, Provincial Governor Huai was also there.

The relationship between Jiang Tian and Gao Xiaolong was such that, in any fight against criminal forces, Gao Xiaolong could settle things for Jiang Tian with a single phone call. This was why Jiang Tian could act with impunity, and Gao Xiaolong could cover for him. Together, they were practically invincible in Yunhai.

"Little Jiang's here, have a seat," Chief Gao waved to Jiang Tian.

Jiang Tian found an empty seat below and sat down. Provincial Governor Huai and Wen Jijiang, seeing this, were both surprised. Huai Sheng was unfazed, but Wen Jijiang's pupils slightly contracted.

Chief Gao's attitude towards Jiang Tian sent a chill down his spine.

"This is Governor Huai, you've met him before," Gao Xiaolong introduced.

Jiang Tian stood up: "We often listen to Governor Huai's work speeches, and they've greatly improved our work, especially since I've been listening to them frequently since the Municipal Bureau."

Governor Huai smiled.

Good, good, good.

Who said Comrade Jiang was young and impetuous, arrogant, reckless, and acted without restraint?

Look how humble Comrade Jiang is, how kind he is to speak! Who's slandering Comrade Jiang as reckless, arrogant, and assaulting a leader?

"Comrade Jiang, you are excellent. You have made a great contribution to Yunhai. I've always wanted to come and see you, but I was afraid of interfering with your work," Governor Huai said with a smile.

So capable.

So kind to speak.

So humble.

And so good at flattering.

Although Huai Sheng was used to hearing those people talk, could Comrade Jiang's words be the same? Even if they were the same, the fact that they came from Jiang's mouth proved that this outstanding comrade had made so many contributions under his leadership.

Huai Sheng smiled broadly.

"Come, come, Comrade Jiang, this is the chairman of Wenye Group. Wenye Group is a pillar industry of our Yun Province. You two should get to know each other," Huai Sheng said to Jiang Tian with a smile.

Upon hearing Huai Sheng's words, Jiang Tian narrowed his eyes, his heart sinking slightly.

Because Wen Jijiang seemed to know Huai Sheng!

He had originally intended to give him two batons directly, but now it seemed he couldn't do that.

"Comrade Jiang, seeing is believing. Nice to meet you. My name is Wen Jijiang."

Wen Jijiang extended his hand, a smile on his face.

But this smile was more like the smile of a venomous snake, a smiling tiger. Hidden beneath that smile, Jiang Tian only saw countless victims.



Chapter 347 This blow will trigger a major earthquake throughout Yunnan Province


Jiang Tian smiled, "President Wen, it's an honor to meet you."

Chief Gao's eyelids twitched slightly.

Clearly, Jiang Tian's smile was forced. Others might not have noticed, but Gao Xiaolong had been with the Municipal Public Security Bureau for so long, practically living there permanently.

Why?

It was all to keep an eye on Jiang Tian.

He was adept at gaining merit.

But his ability to cause trouble was also top-notch.

Have you ever seen anyone engage in a gunfight on the street, in a busy downtown area?

Have you ever seen anyone storm into a company and wipe out dozens of employees over a single disagreement?

Okay, although they were all criminals, Gao Xiaolong was the one who cleaned up the mess and the ensuing problems.

Try it with someone else.

In a sense, Gao Xiaolong was actually Jiang Tian's biggest backer. What Jiang Tian did was something Jiang Peng simply couldn't protect.

Even if they were all criminals.

He understood, which explained Gao Xiaolong's slight twitching.

After shaking hands, Jiang Tian looked at Huai Sheng and said, "Provincial Governor Huai, as you know, under your guidance, our Municipal Bureau has recently apprehended a large number of drug traffickers and criminals, especially our Narcotics Control Team. So, if there's nothing else, I'll take my leave. Chief Gao, if there's nothing else, I'll be going now."

Wen Jijiang hadn't even sat down when he heard this and jumped to his feet.

His expression was so complex that even Jiang Tian, ​​the king of criminal investigations, couldn't decipher it.

Huai Sheng, however, didn't seem displeased.
